videos.title: BTS “Swim” Hits No. 1:Inside BTS' Comeback W/ Diplo Breaking Down Their Comeback Album |Hot 100 Show
videos.description:
BTS scores their seventh No.1 on the Billboard Hot 100 with "Swim," and producer Diplo joins the show to discuss his extensive work on their comeback album "ARIRANG." Diplo takes us inside the two-month studio process at Conway Studios in Los Angeles, where he worked with all seven BTS members to create their highly anticipated return to music after four years. Stephen Sanchez discusses "Love, Love, Love" and his upcoming European tour, plus a rundown of the current Billboard Hot 100 top ten.

0:00 - Intro & Hot 100 Top 10 Countdown 
0:45 - BTS "Swim" Debuts at #1 
1:15 - Diplo Interview Begins 
1:30 - Working with BTS: The Creative Process 
2:20 - Starting with 80+ Song Ideas 
3:15 - Managing Seven Members & Their Individual Styles 
5:30 - Making "Into the Sun" with Jimin in 20 Minutes 
6:45 - Diplo's History with K-Pop 
7:30 - Working with BLACKPINK's Jennie 
8:15 - Hot 100 Positions #7-4 
9:00 - Steven Sanchez Interview 
9:30 - Inspiration Behind "Sweet Love" Album 
10:15 - "Love, Love, Love" Single & Album Title 
11:00 - Upcoming UK/Europe Tour 
11:45 - Stephen Reacts to Hot 100 Tracks 
12:30 - Hot 100 Positions #3-1 
13:00 - BTS Musical Influences & Studio Knowledge 
14:30 - Why Certain Songs Didn't Make the Album 
15:45 - The "Remember Army" Moment in the Studio 
16:30 - Diplo on Next Major Lazer Album & Coachella

videos.title: BTS: The ARIRANG Interview with Zane Lowe | Apple Music
videos.description:
A new chapter begins. Zane Lowe joins BTS at HYBE in Seoul, South Korea to discuss their long awaited return to music with their new album, ARIRANG. The band share their journey to making the record, coming back together after completing military service, and the special bond they share as a group. Watch as they breakdown the tracklist, collaborators and sound behind their tenth studio album.

[웃음] And um uh the nine people they all had to be you know in charge of like three jobs like somebody had to do like uh mails and like shippings and like design at the same time and yeah and now it's like I I think it's like more than like 2000 like 500 people right now. Yeah, we still sometimes can't believe that, you know, we are here actually and we also just got out of the the army and the military and like things changed like so fast back and forth but we just naturally always think about like, you know, they just brought us here and we're we're we're for we're for them and they're for us like at the same time. you know, it's really amazing to um to see a um a growth. So they're getting older right now, you know, as well because we're getting older too. When we had our debut, they were like a elementary school student and now they are like 25 and this someone gets got married and like it's amazing to, you know, getting old with the with the fans. Well, this is an interesting time because this is in my opinion a legacy play. You know, that first phase was the building and the amassing of success and fans and achievements. You could have ended there and it would have been a perfect journey up to that point to come back, you have an opportunity now, probably the first of your generation to mature this experience and start to build legacy. still a a big challenge and I'm also really I'm really afraid of uh a new chapter because we have to show different things you know to convince the fans and the people out there. We want to reach uh maybe different type of people as well. Since we love each other so much we're just here still and the fans are there. So what is the reason that we have to stop this precious brand and a thing and the family? Because you know for my rest of my life I can't ever meet uh a you know people like this because I'm I'm like 33. I was I was like I was 15 when I when I first met them, but now I'm like 32 maybe. But you know, like it was it was my teenage and they are really uh symbolizing my youth as well. Yeah. videos.transcript: -Thank you for coming back to the show. -Yeah. -You have so many accomplishments. I want to run through them so right now we understand what's happening here. First of all, since the last time you were on our show, BTS has been nominated for five Grammys. [ Cheers and applause ] Your single "Seven" made history by being the fastest song in history to reach 1 billion streams. 1 billion. [ Cheers and applause ] A few weeks ago, you replaced yourself on Spotify's list of most streamed songs in the world. [ Cheers and applause ] And now your debut solo album "Golden" is out and it's already breaking all sorts of records. [ Cheers and applause ] Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh! I have news for you. I have news for you that I don't even know if you know this yet. This just happened an hour ago. Your single "Seven" just became platinum right now. [ Cheers and applause ] Come on now! ♪♪ Congratulations. -Thank you. -How does it all feel? Are these things that you imagined were possible? -You... You really make it sound like I'm a huge global pop star. [ Cheers and applause ] -Well, yeah. This helps. Yes, yes, I think you are. I think you are, yeah. [ Crowd cheers ] Yeah. [ Crowd cheers ] The best fans. Before we get into the album, I want to learn more about you. When you're not breaking records and being a global pop star, what do you like doing? Outside of music, what do you do for fun? -I think... uh, it's -- hmm. Pretty ordinary, like many people. Like, sometimes I spend my whole day in bed. [ Laughter ] Or cooking. -Ooh, cooking? -Working out. -Yeah. [ Crowd cheers ] What do you cook? What do you like to cook? -Do you know... [ Crowd cheers ] -No. -Noodle. -Yes! [ Laughter ] I love noodles, yes. Yes, I know that. You slurp? Yeah, yeah, yeah. That's the way to do it. [ Crowd cheers ] Alright. Yes, I will do that. But also I heard that you like making your own pizza. -Pizza. Ah. Yeah. -Yeah? -I like pizza, but... I didn't like leftovers, so... -So like cold pizza, no good? -Yeah. -Well, have you ever had New York City pizza? -Not yet. [ Crowd cheers ] Oh! -I got you... [ Cheers and applause ] I got you. It's not cold. -New York pizza! [ Cheers and applause ] -This is one of my favorite -- This is one of my favorite -- -Your favorite? -Yeah. This is what I like. This is Joe's Pizza. -Let's cheers. -Cheers, bud. [ Cheers and applause ] ♪♪ ♪♪ That's good, right? -Yum! -Yeah. I'm talking about! I have more questions for you. I have more questions for you. I was looking through some interviews with you, and this question made me laugh. It said, what is the scariest thing in the world? The scariest thing in the world for you, and your answer was... Does anyone know? -Microwave! -Yes, a microwave. [ Laughter ] A microwave. "I always worry that it will explode." What are you talking about? -Well, when I was young... -Yeah. -I used to be afraid, but... Still afraid. [ Laughter ] -Why? Why are you afraid? -I don't know. -I guess it's a little frightening, because I don't really understand it. -I don't know, like... -Yeah. -Boom. -Yeah, yeah, yeah. No, nothing is going to happen. No, nothing's going to happen. Nothing is going to happen. You'll be fine with the microwave, but I understand. I don't understand how it does get warmer, but maybe I'll research that and I'll learn. I was looking that you go on this livestream sometimes and I'm going to -- [ Crowd cheers ] Is it called Weverse? -Yeah, Weverse. -Weverse, yeah, is the livestream. And sometimes you do karaoke. [ Crowd cheers ] Sometimes you're cooking. This thing that made me laugh, this is my favorite thing you did. You fell asleep. [ Crowd cheers ] You fell asleep. And you fell asleep and just slept for 45 minutes. And everyone, 6 million people tuned in to watch you sleep. [ Cheering continues ] Did you -- What did you -- Did you feel sleepy going in? What happened? -I think my fans, ARMY, liked it because... [ Crowd cheers ] It was something very unexpected, but... [ Laughter ] -Yes, yes. I want to do this too. [ Laughter ] I think it's so funny. I think it's great. I'm going to try this. Yeah, I know, and we'll see how many people tune in to watch me sleep, but I snore, so it's going to be rough. -I'll see you. -Okay. You'll watch? Thanks. I appreciate it. Since you've been with the band, this is the 10-year anniversary of BTS. [ Crowd cheers ] And you guys have been so nice to come on our show. And thank you very much for always coming on our show. We appreciate it. I was going to ask you what's one thing that you're most proud of? -Yes. [ Cheers and applause ] -That's cool that you stay humble. I want to talk "Golden." Congrats on this. I want to know about the album title. Now, a lot of "Golden" -- Is that a nickname for you, right? [ Crowd cheers ] Golden Maknae. What does that mean, Golden Maknae? -It means "golden youngest." -Okay, yeah. -Of the group in Korean. -Yeah. And so you -- That stuck with you, Golden? And you knew that was going to be the title of the album always if you went solo? [ Crowd cheers ] Yeah. [ Cheers and applause ] And it's a great cover. Great cover. By the way, look at those abs. Yeah. [ Crowd cheers ] Never, never. I'll never -- I'll never achieve that, ever. I love the album. It's fun. I will say the first half is very kind of fun. It's, you know, it's Jack Harlow. Major Lazer. It's kind of poppy and fun. Second half gets kind of more serious. Some are sad, sadder than others. Is that what you wanted? Do you want to be that versatile? Yeah, I think you did it. I think you did it. -Did it! -Do you -- Do you run any of the songs by your bandmates? The rest of BTS? Because we had Jimin on the show, and he told me that -- [ Crowd cheers ] He told me that he runs his songs by you guys before he releases them. [ Laughter ] Yeah. They're nice. Yeah. You're family. Yeah. Can we say that there may be a Golden world tour in the future? [ Crowd cheers ] Yeah. If you need an opening act, I can do two or three songs. [ Crowd cheers ] -Please. -Yeah. Let's talk about the song you're performing, "Standing Next to You," later in the show. What does that song mean to you? [ Crowd cheers ] Is there a little choreography from "Standing Next to You" that you could teach me? -Yeah, of course. -You could teach me? -Let's do it. Let's do it. [ Crowd cheers ] -What do I do? -Okay. So simple. -Okay. -One. Two. Three. Four. Oh, yeah. Bam, bam. ♪ Standing next to you ♪ Bam! [ Crowd cheering ] -I don't know if -- No, yeah, alright. -One, two, three, four. Bam, bam. ♪ Standing next to you ♪ [ Grunts ] [ Crowd cheers ] -I can't do that. I can't. Can I get a beat maybe? -You can do it. ♪♪ -One, two, three, four, five, six. ♪ Standing next to you ♪ ♪ Bah ♪ [ Crowd cheers ] Jungkook, everybody! "Golden" is out now. And later Jungkook will be performing "Standing Next to You." Stick around, everybody! Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo

He's just my dad [Dad is just dad] Exactly -Members are just members -Dad is just dad It's weird trying to explain it [No explanation is needed] Yeah [Members are my family] SUCHWITA's same question for everyone -I know what it is -Time for the last drink Instead of as Jimin of BTS does the person Park Jimin have dreams? [Q. What is the dream of Park Jimin, the person?] If I'm being perfectly honest if that division is made, then I don't think I do I don't think I have separate dreams [Park Jimin the person and Park Jimin of BTS] -as a person and a singer -Yeah So, making that differentiation and asking that question is kind of meaningless Oh, I asked a meaningless question? -That's not what I meant -Got it Let's wrap up SUCHWITA now What is wrong with him? I can't act like this with other guests Yeah, I saw I'm really polite [A polite person] I know, when Lee Sung-min was here you could hardly eat [Practically starved] So, what I want to say is I don't have a separate dream My only dream is to make this team last a long time [Only dream is to be part of BTS for a long time] Until what age? Until I can barely move Personally, even when we're old I think it'd be nice if the seven of us were sitting around with our fans sitting too [ARMY is sitting too] Just talking and singing [Just hang out and sing] Wouldn't we be over 80 then? With everyone sitting... But you still have to swear and rap At 80? What would my grandkids think of me? [Grandpa Daechwita is swearing!] [The trainee who was the last to join] [The trainee who was always last to go home] [Jimin gained six family members] [Worked hard for 10 years with his family] [Even if I have to be on my own for a while] [I know that in the end I have a family who loves me] Since your first solo album is coming out I got a present for you [Prepared a present] A present From L'OCCITANE [L'OCCITANE gift set] I've heard of it It's a home mist and pillow mist [Relaxing pillow mist & purifying home mist] It's a mist to spray on your pillow Oh, really? And a fragrance for your home Can I open it now? -Smell it -I'm so curious Is this the one for pillows? -This one is pillow mist -The pillow mist -is for spraying on your pillow -Okay -And the home mist is for rooms -It's nice! It's nice L'OCCITANE fragrances are the best [Whiff] It's a forest scent [A home mist that smells like the forest] You know what I mean? Oh, yeah It really smells like trees [IN THE SOOP as soon as it's sprayed] The pillow mist -I really like it -is lavender [Pillow mist smells like lavender] You have a hard time sleeping during promotions Spray the pillow mist and you'll smell lavender [Try it] What? What's so funny? [LOL] It's relaxing That's what lavender does I really appreciate it but the way you're kindly explaining everything -feels so weird -Give it to me. Give it -You're gonna take it for yourself -I won't L'OCCITANE [Fragrances are L'OCCITANE] [2nd oldest member's product placement to keep the younger members warm] Pillow mist and... I knew it [Deeply moved] Room spray [Signing his autograph] "To SUCHWITA, I had a great time" Are you ready? -Let's do this -Let's do this We look like grandpas We look like grandpas Let's stop We look too old I can't do this Why do people do this? I seem like an old man that wants to do TikTok Why is this trending? -I don't know -I don't get it Anyway, Jimin I hope "FACE" is a huge hit [To. Jimin I hope there is always a smile on your face while promoting "FACE"] Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo

videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA] [Time to drink with SUGA] [This content is brought to you by Hanyang Hwaro] It's been a while but we're back with SUCHWITA I had my last concert in Seoul two days ago and came to record SUCHWITA right away [Host came straight to SUCHWITA after his Seoul concert] It feels like I'm back home after a long time [Congrats] Our guest today is a really, really, really energetic guy so I'm excited Name, Jeon Jung Kook Occupation, BTS's golden maknae and will still be even at the age of 60 "I've been constantly saying that I wanted to be on SUCHWITA but seriously... It took five months for Yoongi to finally invite me I'm so upset!" [JK / Yoongi won't give me an answer I'm so upset!] Jung Kook Come on in It's great to see you [BTS Jung Kook] [BTS's golden maknae] [A talented guy who makes the members laugh] [and an irreplaceable genius vocalist] [He's back with his solo single "Seven (feat. Latto)"] [BTS Jung Kook] You changed the lyrics to "Daechwita" while streaming live [Fan who changed the lyrics of "Daechwita" for SUCHWITA♡] and generated a lot of buzz for SUCHWITA Why'd it take so long to invite me? That's why I specially prepared a karaoke machine for you [A karaoke machine just for Jung Kook] I don't know if I'll sing though -Maybe I will after a few drinks -Yeah [He did] [Super energetically] You need to sing in places like this to get a lot of views [Got it] Got it? [Flashes a V here too] There are more cameras than I expected! It's been a while since you've been on a variety show Yeah It's hard to get used to, right? You mentioned SUCHWITA a lot though and you even reviewed Jimin's episode live on Weverse Yeah And after seeing us do the "sorry for being cute challenge" you made a face saying "What is wrong with Yoongi?" Yeah [Hey, this song...?] [Chu! Sorry for being cute♡] [Sorry...] [for being cute...] SUGA! Hello [I'm watching] Wow, it's been so long I think I'd just hang up I can't watch [Jung Kook really stopped watching] Yoongi, what is wrong with you? What were you thinking? Uh, anyway That was then [Quickly changes the subject] I invited you because you wanted me to You said you had a really nice drink -Yeah -So, did you bring it? It's something I drink often -Highball -Highball [Highball / A cocktail made with a spirit mixed with a carbonated beverage or water with ice] I like highballs Are you good at making them? I just make them to my liking Even when doing live... [Springs up] Why do you keep doing that? To prevent muscle loss The last time we had drinks with just the two of us was that time at my place Yeah, at your place We had wine Yeah, it's been so long [Their very own wine meetup] That was when I wrote "People Pt.2" Oh -That day -It was that day! We just suddenly started writing a song while drinking [Jung Kook sang for the guide demo of "People Pt.2"] It's been a while since just the two of us had drinks [Their first time since that day!] I never expected to be drinking here Should we have a drink first? [SUGA & Jung Kook's highball recipe] [1. Add ice to the glass to chill it] [2. Add a shot of whisky of your liking] [A little more for Jung Kook...] [3. Fill up the glass with carbonated water] [4. Squeeze a slice of lemon and add it as garnish] [5. Stir to mix] [The glass of highball is ready to drink] The two of us drinking was on TV once When we were in Malta -Right -Friendship is drinking Irish slammers -Irish slammers -Yeah [A clean] [chug] [Another chug] Friendship is what? Drinking Irish slammers Then today, let's say friendship is drinking highballs Friendship is drinking highballs Since you said we'd be drinking highballs today I prepared beef This is from Hanyang Hwaro [Hanyang Hwaro] [Outside skirt] [Chuck tail flap] [Wow] Looks amazing They're a super popular place right now Dong-seok is the model for their ads [Dong-seok just happens to be the model♡] They use charcoal grills Their restaurants use charcoal grills but we can't here since its indoors [Charcoal grills at their restaurants] Looks good Is it tastier with a charcoal grill? A lot tastier! You wanna grill it since you like meat? [Knows how to eat] Mmm -The marbling is nice! -Yeah [An electric grill instead of a charcoal grill on SUCHWITA!] Oh, yeah Looks so good Yum, it's good -It's good? -Yeah I heard you're doing intermittent fasting these days? Yes, apparently it's good for your health I was looking up info on diets [※Consult a relevant specialist first※] and learned everything there is to know about intermittent fasting I thought it'd be good for me Do you do it 16:8 or... -20:4 -That's tough But I'm not obsessive... You don't always keep to that schedule, right? I don't do it obsessively It's less stressful if you just think of it as eating one or two meals a day But there must've been a reason why you started intermittent fasting Since I have a jacket shoot in the US Yeah And to get ready for your comeback Right, my comeback We should talk about that -We should -Yeah Ask me anything and I'll answer the best I can -You have a single coming out -Yes, it took such a long time Tell us about the song Shouldn't we listen to it first? I haven't heard it yet since I was on tour Really? You haven't heard it yet? I wasn't in Korea for two months Oh Right Can you play the song? Yeah Can you turn up the volume? [Barbecue time during the interval♡] Oh, okay, okay, okay I'm getting a feeling already [The feeling of a hit in that short moment] It's awesome, right? Let's go, No. 1 on the Hot 100! [Billboard HOT 100 No. 1!] Jung Kook, let's go! Get a move on! I can tell just from the first verse that it'll be No. 1 on the HOT 100! Let's go! [Congratulations][Prediction realized] [As he goes from BTS member Jung Kook] [to solo artist Jung Kook] [the song that will begin his journey] [A summer song that will create a splash this summer] Do you have a choreo for this? I do Can I see it? You want me to show you now? Yes, yes, yes, dance [That'd be great] This is how it goes It's perfect for a dance challenge video This is how it goes Nice... Nice...! Wow [Feeling proud] I'm sure it'll go to No. 1 on the HOT 100 You did it! I can relax now It's a great song What are you gonna do for solo promotions? [Q. Any plans for solo promotions?] For my promotions it's not gonna be like a comeback -In that market -It'll be like a debut [Promoting like a new solo artist] it'll be like a debut You have media promotions lined up in the US and the UK? Yes I'll be starting out with Good Morning America How do you want to perform? I just want to do what I do best and be totally awesome at it What will you be performing? "Dynamite" and... "Seven," "Dynamite," "Euphoria" These three Everyone's been dying to see you -Yeah -ARMY I should get myself in shape before I go Go and slay hard [Jung Kook, go and be yourself♡] Everyone will go crazy How did you start this project? [Q. How did you start working on "Seven"?] Didn't you go to the US? Yes, I worked on it in the US [A. Started work in the US] I got the song [First of all] And I loved it -Yeah -The moment I heard it I was like "I have to do this" Totally Without the song "Seven" I might've still been on a break right now I loved being on a break [For real] For real I have a hard time when I'm on a break I was totally enjoying my time off and this song got me started again ["Seven" got him started as a solo artist] If I had heard this song I would've done it myself I'd have been like, "Let me do it I'll sing it in English" [A bold switch to a vocalist] Anyway, so that's how I started You recorded it in the States Yes And while I was there... I am proud to be a K-idol So I worked really hard on the details as I was recording Yeah I had to keep up Korea's BTS's main vocalist Jeon Jung Kook Did you set everyone straight? Uh... I don't know about that -Yeah -But anyway, I did good You recorded it really well [Never sloppy when it comes to music] [Great at his job] [Showed everyone!] -So, you have a digital single coming out -Yes What's next after the single? After the single I have another single Yeah And then, I'll be releasing a small mini album by November [Even planning an album too!] You must be busy then I am Are the songs for the album all ready then? No I have to start working on them now I think this single will be a huge, huge hit I want a song like this for my second single too but I haven't found it I could just write one for you A song by you? Can you do a good job? No [LOL] On my laptop there's every kind of song What about doing Jersey? -Jersey club? -Yeah I did want to try Jersey club I have a track for that! I really do You can do that one! Do what? Just do it Okay? Uh... Just send it to me then Just send it? I've mentioned this a lot on TV shows before but of all the vocalists I've ever met you're the most genius Yes That's what I said about you when I met other songwriters The meeting of two geniuses It's great to see you Yeah, sure And people need to know this Before he joined the agency he had never sung in his life Right And I've seen everything you've gone through ["Genius," a word that always follows Jung Kook around] Honestly, in the past hearing that was a lot of pressure and I didn't like hearing it But I had to work even harder because people were saying that Right You just have to keep going You were born with the talent You're good at singing high notes too I couldn't before What was hard for me when you practiced was that you'd always be singing every moment your eyes were open I'd be like "Can you not sing in the car?" "Can you not sing in the green room?" I got told off a lot But that's how hard you worked Everyone on our team is a super hard worker -We had to be -Yeah And it's been ten years now! Ten years! Wow What's so interesting about our team is that we each have a clear role which is great Yeah Roles that no one else can do I think that really helps us complement each other I love that about us You guys in the rap line were a big influence on us When we were trainees the vocal line would just be fooling around not listening to any songs [The four in the vocal line had a relatively easygoing time] and the rap line guys would get upset -and gather us around -With a list of songs [Gave them work♡] with a long list of songs and told us to make sure to listen to them all You did that for us [Made them listen to various genres of music] So after we debuted... Now I don't listen to them anymore I don't listen to them [Time goes by...] If I'm being honest I didn't listen back then either [The same even as time goes by...] But now you do I just play random songs [Just listens randomly...] But you could do that since you had talent Honestly, you just have talent The agency... made a very great choice But without you... [LOL] what would we have done? I'm just kidding ["I think Jung Kook is our DNA" - RM] No You once said you wanted to be good enough to perform on your own for three to four hours? Yes, during an interview The only concerts I've ever done are our team concerts and I was curious about my own abilities I was curious whether I could put on a concert all on my own You saw me in Seoul My concert [Went to SUGA's concert to cheer him on] I stayed until the very end and I noticed that the stage gradually disappeared Yeah Was that intentional? That was part of the production -Oh! -But people found that really cool Seeing the stage disappear I know! At the end, only a tiny part was left That was a great idea Solo concerts and team concerts are different because for team concerts, there's not much you can do regarding the production [There are limits to stage production for team concerts] Right For example, when we're dancing or performing -the audience has to watch like this -Yeah [The audience's attention is divided evenly among the 7 members] So there aren't a lot of sets or things we can use [More focus on the group performance rather than the stage production] But if you do it alone you can do anything you want I think it'll be fun What should I do for my concerts? Should I come up with ideas already? When the time comes I'll tell you all you need to know I prepared for a really long time for my tour Yeah I did run-throughs starting a month before -Three times a week -Seriously? I did 28 concerts for my tour Wow And I did 20 run-throughs before starting the tour -In Korea? -Yeah I did it exactly like the real thing [Practically did twice as many concerts] You worked really hard Honestly, it was scary doing it alone [Prepared close to perfection feeling the weight of being alone] It must be scary What's good about a team is that you have members supporting you [Dependable members who support you] I caught a really bad cold halfway through [SUGA caught a cold during his tour] It was so bad, I thought I might collapse on stage While during this tour? When I got back to Korea after the tour I did nothing but sleep That must've been so stressful -When I got up in the morning -Yeah you know I never get a hoarse throat -Yeah -But [Couldn't talk due to his poor condition] You couldn't talk? That's how I sounded I was with my parents and they told me to stay in my room [Stayed away from his family just in case] So I got tested but I was okay That's good [Fortunately, he was okay] I didn't have COVID But I still had to go up on stage [Although he was sick] So I did... I just had to do it Even though I was running a fever of 38 to 39 degrees [Fever kept rising] I had to play the guitar and sing but my voice was a mess [ARMY was waiting for me] That's so stressful But I still had to sing live Right The drink you had in your hand was whiskey, wasn't it? Yea, it was a highball At first, it was just whiskey on the rocks but I switched it to a highball after I caught that cold I made it into a "hyperball" -Hyperball? -Yeah Like with an energy... With an energy drink, lemon, and ginger... And things like bellflower root? I just put everything in it [Made a drink to recover his health] I was like, "If I drink this I can perform on stage!" So you were recovering while performing! I could perform on stage [As long as I can perform...!] Anyway, after I had that I got through it even though I was so sick That's the hardest part when performing alone You just have to... You don't have anyone you can lean on Yeah No one's there to take your place You can't run from it [Everything is on you] You just have to go up on stage So if you... do put on a concert I'll give you some tips since I've already done it Do you have tips for when you're sick? I do! I really do! Oh, nice We have to talk about that [While we're on the subject of solo performances] I wondered how you did it Did what? The Qatar World Cup [2022 Qatar] Oh, Qatar I was watching it live Don't you think the entire country was watching it? Prob... ably? While I was watching I said out loud... -I was watching it alone at home -Yeah "He's so cool" For real, for real I was like "Wow" We're on the same team and we perform together but as an ordinary citizen [As Min Yoongi, a Korean citizen] I felt so proud my shoulders went like this [Hehe] That's our team's youngest [That cool kid is our team's youngest] Everyone was talking about you [Jung Kook got a lot of support from the older members] Tell me about how you prepared for it Preparing for it wasn't easy... You know how it is You notice the parts that need work [Tuned up with the members over the years] There were a lot of parts that needed more work It was just different [Different from the stages and setups he was used to] So, I went five to six days before the show in Qatar and I was really glad I got there early Why? I thought I only had to do a rehearsal once I got there but I realized we had to improve some parts [Wanted to do better once he got there!] And I didn't get any choreo either Oh, really? I didn't get anything There were dancers but I didn't have any choreo [Choreo for dancers but not Jung Kook] I thought It would be so weird if I didn't dance while everyone else was so I just asked for the choreo video [Instantly copied the choreo on site] I said I'd just copy it -So you did? -Yeah And during the last chorus the choreo changes -Yeah -It becomes intense like this I asked them to change that part so they did [With Jung Kook's active input] And I redid the formations [The choreo and formations became better] That's how it went Originally, there was nothing But it was so... While I was watching I thought you just looked like a total superstar I was talking with the members and we were like "He has to be a singer until the day he dies" Of course That's what we thought I had a lot of fun [In Qatar] When I walked off stage I felt really bummed though I could've done so much better! That's all I could think about He's the type that really cries if he feels if he didn't do well on stage He gets so upset "SUGA" I can't help but think "Is this really the best I can do?" I look at myself really subjectively -Yeah -instead of objectively Because it's me I always wonder if I did well That's our strength Constantly wanting to do better is our strength but we do need to be a bit objective about our team and ourselves Since we can't always live like that [with regrets] That's what I'm trying to do these days! Thinking that way shows me what I need to work on more -Separately -That's true I have to be able to look at things objectively [Being objective] in order to see the areas I lack in [leads to improvement and positivity] and I'll be able to work on them This is where I think you've grown a lot In the past, when you were stuck on something... I couldn't get past it You'd have such a hard time [Jung Kook blamed himself in the past and had a hard time] No matter how much we told you it was okay [Even though members said it was okay] you couldn't get over it even three to four years ago [Couldn't look at himself objectively] Right -When we were on tour -But as we went on a break [However, through their break] you were able to focus on yourself Through Qatar and your new single [Seven] I can tell that you've grown a lot [Jung Kook was able to shine more] Yeah, life became more enjoyable -Right -I think it's nice We've lived with intensity I just know instinctively When you were younger [The golden maknae] you had a lot of worries [In the past] -I did -Yeah I think I feel reassured now You're doing well on your own I think it's all because I met the really good BTS members The six of us think we're lucky [Our Jung Kook♡] that we met you That's what's great about our team We fought a lot when we were younger That's how we came this far I met Jimin yesterday for drinks You did? You had drinks with Jimin He always talks about that when we meet -About the past -Yeah [Talking about memories] Our memories Right, right, right I think this was all possible because we didn't know anything back then If we had known what to do and when [If we had known from the start] I don't think we could have done this We were all just kind of fools and did what we were told -We were so raw -Yeah And we all wanted to do more And felt things were unfair so we worked that much harder Our video clips start to show up during MAMA season Yeah [Dizzy] But seriously watching them makes me cry a little -Really? -Yeah I was watching the MAMA "Mic Drop" clip [2017 MAMA "Mic Drop" performance] Yeah That one's okay What was that one? For our 10th anniversary they played the video for "No More Dream" and I almost threw the remote control "No More Dream" was pretty good I can't bring myself to watch it Your gesture You only had this one move Just one move! This is all I do "It's a lie" This is all you do [Jung Kook] Why did I do that? Come on, we had just debuted You can't expect us to perform like we do now The Jeon Jung Kook now is not the same person as the Jeon Jung Kook then If we had done well then maybe we wouldn't have worked so hard Because of that rawness back then you ended up performing at the Qatar World Cup It's so embarrassing [Embarrassing] Jimin talks about it too We've been in this industry for a long time -That's what he talks about -We have to keep at it I think we'll still be around when we're 60 It's Chapter 2 now I think we can go up to Chapter 6 Let's say each chapter is ten years When we get older, we can do an a cappella version of "No More Dream" We could do dinner shows Sounds fun How fun would that be? Ha... ARMY will be grannies too by then No, they won't be as old as grannies No I mean, we'd be like grandpas too Shouldn't we be at least 60 years old then? Wouldn't we be that old around Chapter 6? While I was on tour, I felt that our fans are growing older together with us Right And so while we continue to do music as we grow older and talk about past memories we just grow older together talking about it [With ARMY] -I did a video call fansign event -Yeah [Agust D met with ARMY through a video call fansign event] recently We can talk one on one now And you know how we couldn't do promotions during the pandemic? So ARMY told me what went on in between Oh During that period [ARMY told him what went on during the interval] For those two to three years What ARMY thought about We're not just fans and artists anymore We're more like just partners now That's just how things should be It'd be hilarious doing a video call fansign event when we're old We'd be looking at our phones like this with blurry eyes [Blurry] One ARMY said to me "I've been your fan ever since elementary school and now I've graduated from college and I'm starting a new job" -That's what she told me -That's awesome Since it's been ten years It kind of made me emotional Wow... Which university did she go to? I didn't ask [Hehe] I don't know where she went Which concert do you remember the most? At the top of my head, "Euphoria" where I was flying Oh, Chicago!? When I was half out of my mind That happens when it rains It was cold and rainy that day so everyone kind of lost it while performing Usually, after pouring out all your energy on stage you feel exhausted Right But I didn't feel that way that time because I was out of my mind I had so much fun Honestly, I want to do more of that We can't now, not right now -It's physically impossible right now -Yeah But if everyone is discharged from their military service [later] Yeah I could go crazy When Seokjin went to serve he called and said "Yoongi, I want to perform so bad" Yeah He talks about that in our group chat too We all feel the same way [All 7 of them miss the stage] It's so fun Performing on stage is just fun But... You know... I keep thinking about it even if I don't want to Wanting to perform For me, it's when you got injured [SUGA's pick] Oh He suddenly went to the restroom saying he was going to warm up -I went to the restroom... -And he came out screaming All that blood! Ah... And he cried because he couldn't perform -I was so upset -Yeah I hurt myself You're hurt? I'm so bummed [Injured his heel while warming up] He's always determined to deliver the best possible performances We have to take him to get stitches I can't believe this is happening Why am I on the floor? I'm glad you're laughing at least I was worried you'd be crying so I came running over [In the end, he had to sing sitting on a chair at that concert] [Jung Kook was upset and cried] We have to sit on that chair "The chair of reflection" Right It's so awkward While the members are dancing Between ourselves we say "Go sit on the chair of reflection!" And when you're sitting on that chair you have no idea what to do honestly when you're on that chair It'd just be better to perform while limping Yeah And at the end I was so frustrated that I just walked on stage -Everyone but Hobi has sat on that chair -Everyone except for Hobi [Everyone has sat on the chair except for Hobi] It's so awkward You don't know what to do It makes you think twice about getting hurt You can't Work out regularly -Yeah -You need to exercise You have to work out not to get injured Do you work out these days? I work out hard The Cal*** Klein shoot! [That reminds me!] Like a pop star! You were totally a pop star! When I saw that I was like, "Wow" I wonder if I still have abs Do you? I do Can you show us? You wanna see? Let's aim for 10 million views [Peek-a-boo] Can you turn off the lights? You wanna get some makeup done? Over here In one of your interviews you said you had a personality made up of all the members' personalities [Q. Jung Kook has a personality made up of the other six members' personalities?] It's true I think so too In the way I talk you can hear all the members What did you take from me then? It's not like I took something It's more like I was a sponge that just absorbed everything [Jung Kook became like the members without even realizing it] In my opinion, you were influenced by different guys in each era Sometimes, it was Namjoon Sometimes, it was Seokjin I didn't really think about myself That means you're flexible But sometimes when I'm talking to other people the key points you guys talked about pop into my head For example? I can't remember an example [LOL, so cute, LOL] But I get that feeling You flash through my mind during my conversations I'm grateful that I flash through your mind Sometimes I give advice to my friends Yeah Usually, I'm the one getting advice from you guys, right? You're giving advice now! -When we're talking... -You're all grown up Yoongi! You zoom through my head like that Jung Kook is all grown up You're an adult now You guys are all part of me and sometimes, you pop out one at a time I think the seven of us feel more like family than my actual family I've seen you guys more than my own family You spent half your life... Right, right I've been influenced a lot by the members too Who were you most influenced by? I think I was influenced by all seven equally The other members can do things that I can't But instead of not doing it since it's not my area I watched them and tried to learn [Members motivated him to be better] They motivated me a lot All seven are like that Yeah -That's really... -That's really fascinating too [Fascinating] That's a really good thing I think we were influenced by each other a lot Yeah I was lucky to meet good people I'm a quick learner, so if you guys hadn't been good people I would've been like that too And I would've lived without knowing it was wrong You have good people around you because you're a good person I don't know about that I've never thought of myself as a good person Well, you're not a bad person I think I could've been if I had been under bad influence No it's not in your nature [You're too naturally-good to be bad] I think I just naturally tried to learn the good things without even realizing it That's what I tried to do Our members were all really nice though -Yeah -So nice Everyone is really open-minded I think maybe we could've just been chosen to be BTS If there is a God Yeah, I believe in fate One of the things that I feel really lucky about... That way, I'd hear that I'm a genius as soon as I debuted You've already been called a genius since you debuted No, I haven't You were already good back then I wasn't We were all bad But how can you be good from the start? Yeah Even now, I think that I'm lacking in many ways But if I work really hard at it and reach the level where I'm satisfied with myself At that time...
