videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA] [Time to drink with SUGA] [Brought to you by Hanwoo Board and Le Mouton] It's already been a year since SUCHWITA began [As of the recording date] [Congrats to me...] [Congrats / Soon to be SUCHWITA's 1st anniversary] I had no idea we'd go on for this long when we first started Thank you so much, everyone [♥Overwhelming thanks♥] And on top of that, we have a guest who wanted to be on the show again so he booked a table [Became a regular with just two appearances] In the heat of summer he exploded with energy [Equipped with the explosive energy of summer] and in the fall he's here to cool us down [and the coolness of fall] My buddy who's always upbeat Last time, he definitely said he had nothing more left to say but, let's meet him and hear what he has to say Name, Jung Kook Occupation, a walker who always walks with ARMY "Loved the drinks, food, and vibe! [Beef Hunter] Can't stop thinking about it If you're busy, just leave the door open I'll just hang by myself!" Jung Kook! Let's go! Always walking with ARMY I'm Jung Kook [BTS Jung Kook] ["Seven (feat. Latto)" His first solo song took the world by storm] ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" His next track was another hit] ["Standing Next to You" Solidifying his place as a global pop star] [A guest who's back BTS Jung Kook] Hey, how long did you hang out after the shoot that day? About an hour You sang that many songs? Well, since ARMY likes it when I sing... SUCHWITA got over 10 million views on a video for the first time Let's go [JK is insanely awesome][13M views] [EP 15. Have a Drink on SUCHWITA] [13M views] You kept your hair long for a while Last time, middle schooler Kookie was here [EP. 15 Middle schooler Kookie] -I see you got a haircut this time -Yeah [EP. 21 Clean-cut Kookie] But when your hair is shorter your face stands out more I should've tried to slim down more... Compared to last time, you have a bit more...! Yeah, yeah, yeah It's pretty cute I failed [Diet failed] I heard you had a lot of fun that day There must've been a reason why you wanted to be on the show again Since this is gonna be released in November my album will be almost ready by then [Album is a go!] "Seven" was actually... [Jung Kook's "Seven (feat. Latto)" received a lot of love this summer] Do you remember? Billboard? I said it would go to number one on the Billboard Hot 100 chart I think it happened because you said it would [Minstradamus's prediction was correct] When I first heard it I just knew that it would be huge [No need for words] Number one [Billboard No. 1] And the enormous numbers [Enormous streaming numbers] It's dominating the global charts now not just the Korean music shows -How do you feel? -Right I was pretty confident about it... But it's getting so much more love than I had expected... We'll talk more about it -over the drink that Jung Kook prepared -Over a drink I brought something really nice! Oh, something nice [Hi**ki 21 / A Japanese blended whisky with a rich malt whisky flavor] [Warms up hands] You must be really busy these days I'm almost done! The main game starts now But as someone who's known you for a very long time I hope you finish without exhausting yourself Just keep your mind strong Doing things on your own is really different from doing things with members by your side, emotionally -Right -It's really different I missed the guys... -Drink up and let's have a deep -A deep conversation together [Let's talk about music again today] Since your album will be out really soon I prepared a hearty meal so you can get your strength up -Bring it in, please -I'm ready [Hehe] It's beef again today [Meat] [Come on] [Hanwoo] [Come on] The Hanwoo Board prepared some hanwoo with amazing marbling just for you -Wow -It's hanwoo Wow, the rice This is a lot [Haha] Since you eat so well Last time, you even ate some of mine -Right, right, right -That's why they prepared more today [Prepared plenty of rice...♥] Wow, the grill too Got you a griddle Looks great! They said they prepared a hanwoo cake to celebrate your album A hanwoo cake? [Cracks up] Wow! [This is the hanwoo cake] -You should take this home -Yeah -Can I take it home? -Of course How many grams is this? We'll keep it in the fridge so that it doesn't go bad Wow, thank you It looks amazing L... L... L... Looks amazing -Seriously -You know? I ate really well while I was on tour [Hehe] I ate all sorts of things but hanwoo... -It's the best? -It's the best. For real [Yes!] It recharges your energy Let's take our time I love meat It's good! -Have a drink -Drink up Are you still doing intermittent fasting these days? These days... I should have [Ha...] [Haha...] Why haven't you been? It's too hard Of course it's hard As soon as my tour was over I ate like crazy and gained a ton of weight [LOL] All I kept thinking about was "I'll start dieting tomorrow" Me too. I'm gonna start again tomorrow I'm starting tomorrow but the shoot is the day after that A shoot for what? My music video [As of the date of recording Jung Kook will soon be off to shoot his MV] -Oh, your music video? -Yes The "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" music video will be out by the time this airs Yeah, your next single "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)"! "3D" will be out by then [Jung Kook's second single "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)"] but we're about to shoot the music video now What's "3D" about? It's a love song too Simply put... It's kind of like "I wanna see you in 3D" Like you wanna see more diverse sides? -Right, right, right -Something like that? It's like... The 2000s! Let's take a listen! I haven't heard it yet ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" / Jung Kook] Oh, it is! The dance too! The movements are precise! ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" An old-school sound from the mid-2000s] [featuring Jack Harlow] You're really good! I should be! You're the main vocalist of BTS! -Right -You should be good Last time, you asked me if I set everyone straight I did Yeah [Satisfied] It was tough -It was really tough -Why? -I had to decide on my next single -Yeah -But "Seven" got such a great response -Yeah so I wanted something that pulled you in like that But it was so hard finding the right song The funny thing is though I recorded "3D" later than the title track of my album -You recorded it last? -Yes I recorded it while I was working on the other tracks for my album After hitting 1st on the Billboard Hot 100 you wrote "Let's go higher" on Weverse Is there a higher place you can go? -Of course! -Mars? Let's go! [Haha][LOL] Last time, I talked about how I wanted to reach a level where I could be satisfied with myself -Besides, we have a lot more goals up here -Yeah We always had a lot of goals as a team too They were always up high I feel the same way going solo But it's not easy [After achieving so much] always having more goals Without my aspirations to improve myself I'm basically a dead man Didn't you used to say that about passion? It's more or less the same thing [Well...] [LOL] I nagged you about going on music shows the last time you were here So how did it feel being on music shows again? You even got to do an encore [Jung Kook came in first place on music shows during his promotions] All the other artists were up on stage with you -Honestly! -Yeah A few ARMY were there to see me [After the pre-recording] [To see the encore] So I wanted to stay as long as I could Also, I wasn't expecting to come in first Why not? All the numbers were pointing to it Come on I wasn't expecting it at all so I was thinking I should show ARMY my face as long as I could on stage before coming down, but then suddenly I came in first place -So... -Yeah, you looked so surprised It was so sudden and I was so surprised And the clip of the encore... It got so much buzz! The legendary 3:37 ♪ Monday Tues... ♪ It used to be Ji-min [LOL] His was the legendary 3:33 ARMY's legendary 3:37 I saw it too I didn't expect this at all [July 30, 2023, Encore stage after coming in first place on a music show] Source: SBS] Sing with me! [Enjoyed the encore stage with ARMY] [Handed over the mic one more time at 3:37] [JK / Who was this amazing fan at 3:37...] [JK / Our ARMY are great singers!!!] They were... just so happy! [Of course] "I hope my energy... reaches Jung Kook" That's what she probably felt During the pre-recording, the entire venue -Right, right -is filled with our fans But during the live show -There are other artists -there a lots of fans of other artists [Fans of various artists are there too] So there aren't as many of our fans In the middle of all that they wanted to cheer you on Right, right I think they wanted to build up harmony I think they wanted to sing an octave higher than you [LOL][LOL] But they couldn't go so high [Serious about teasing ARMY] -But their feelings got across -Yeah And they got across to all the viewers watching the live show and to me and all the members They got across -Right, right -They got across [ARMY is so cute, haha♥] We should talk about your overseas promotions [Jung Kook promoted overseas as well] GMA Live Lounge Your overseas promotions got a lot of attention as well Didn't it rain then? -When you were on GMA? -It seemed like it was gonna rain with thunder Apparently, you have to take shelter if there's thunder [Because of how the park is laid out] so I just suddenly had to go up in five minutes [Rehearsal was cancelled too] -Without a rehearsal? -Yeah I was told I just had to start the pre-recording I was like "Huh? What?" And I wasn't even feeling well then [So cute, haha] so I was kind of panicking But it all ended well [Despite not being in his best form his performance on GMA was a success] You did good I could've done better [Still] You always say that I'm kind of a perfectionist That's just how I am Being that way has its advantages But you've been telling me that I should learn how to let go sometimes so these days I'm trying to just accept things as they are After promoting for "3D" and your solo album watch your "Seven" performance on GMA or Live Lounge and you'll be like "Huh?" Not bad! "It wasn't that bad after all" "Hey, I was pretty good" That's what you will probably think That would be nice [Haha] Sometimes, when I hear you singing live it's like you're on autotune It just happened at some point -At some point? -Yeah I think it was during "Dynamite" Yes, that's it! -That was when I improved a lot -Yeah Like you broke through [Jung Kook grew some more?] That's what I thought -I'm making a new breakthrough again these days -Yeah -You have to keep changing -I keep changing And try new genres Right, right We're not artists that do just one genre Yeah [BTS can cover various genres] When we can do various genres... I really like being able to do that -It's our weapon, our strongest weapon -Totally I started out with rap and hip-hop but now I can do all sorts of genres When I was younger, I thought just doing one genre was really cool I thought it made you look like an expert [Mindset of an expert...] Where you have something of your own [A genre that you specialize in] But nowadays, you have to know how to do everything Diversity is important When you were younger you probably wanted to sing more than you wanted to rap but because of your experience rapping you can do these genres now -Right -So in the end, all the things we did ended up becoming our strengths Exactly I guess we could define our musical style if we tried but we did so much -We didn't stick to one genre -We didn't stick to one [No boundaries in genres] I think that really helped me It's because of your experience rapping [Self-pat] -"My name is Jung Kook" -Yeah, yeah You were already doing "Seven" since then -Yeah -This was the only gesture you did It all started here? [Chills] You had this one gesture It took ten years to reveal what it meant ["Seven" is bewildered] You're able to sing these cool pop songs because you went through that process [Became an amazing pop star] Recently you went to the US with Jimin [Jung Kook went to the US with Jimin?!] and you called me during your shoot What were you filming? [Q. What did you film in the US with Jimin?] [Here comes a spoiler] All I heard from Jimin was "Hey, I'm going to the US tomorrow!" So I asked "Why are you going to the US again?" And he said "I'm going to the US to drink with Jung Kook" [LOL] "You're going to the US to drink with Jung Kook? That's so awesome" [LOL, haha] So he went [LOL] and the next day you guys suddenly called -while you were camping -Right, right What was that about? On a shoot with Jimin ages ago he said it might be fun to do a travel variety show with me and I agreed But it didn't end up going anywhere after that Then suddenly, they set up a shoot [Funny already] It was so funny after Jimin came Why? It was just... a total mess Why? -As soon as he came... -Yeah [Spoiler...] [LOL] There's something about Jimin that tugs at your heartstrings Yeah, it was so funny and the next day we were doing something... [Second spoiler...] It was hilarious [Jimin & Jung Kook, coming soon!] You're filming a documentary now? Yes, I am It follows the process from "Seven" to my album [Wanted to leave a record of producing "GOLDEN"] How does it feel with documentary cameras following you around? It feels different from when the whole team is with you, right? Honestly... When you film with other members the cameras aren't all focused on you But I always feel kind of pressured talking in front of a camera alone [Not used to cameras only filming me] I feel like I have to do something but I don't know what to do so I feel the pressure from that But documentaries are filmed to capture that side of you Just the fact that it films the entire process gives you something to talk about ten years later Even with footage that isn't released Just having it as a record of that time It's really... You don't have to use it! But the fact that you have it [Merit of documentaries Gives you lots to talk about someday] means you have a source you can use at a later time That's why you film for so long I remember seeing you working in your studio "Do you know what it took for me to get this far?" [Jumps up] [Kitty punch!!!] [Laughter malfunction] The thing about... documentary cameras is you get the most candid shots when you're not aware that they're filming you It was nice seeing you like that Despite how busy you were you performed as a guest at SUGA aka Agust D's concert [Jung Kook performed as a guest] I asked you multiple times but you kept turning me down so why did you suddenly change your mind? Did you just really want to be on stage? Well... Honestly... I wanted to support you -so I thought being there would encourage you -Right, right, right And also, because of ARMY It had been a while since I had seen that many ARMY so I really wanted to be there The biggest reason why I wanted to be on stage with the members -was because it had been so long since we put on a concert -Yeah We've actually talked about this The feeling you get when you're up on stage and hearing the cheers... -It gives you the chills I just got them again -Yeah I just really wanted to feel that again Whether it was Jimin, you or Namjoon, the truth is... -The truth is... -Considering the overall flow -Right, right -Yeah In order for the concert setlist to flow naturally it's better not to have the members perform [Better to perform alone as it is about his personal story] -That would've been better for the quality of the concert -Right but, it was a standing concert -That energy -Yeah I'm sure the reason you went on tour was because you wanted to, of course But you also told me that the main reason was because of all the ARMY who wanted to see our concert and how happy they would be It's true that they really miss seeing us and if I hadn't gone on tour this year the break between tours would've been too long When I was listening to you talk about it I was like... You really think a lot about our fans I did video fansign events and mini fan meetings for the first time in a while I'm going to do them too! Yeah, and it was a lot more fun than I expected I think it'll be fun When I meet people, they always give me messages of support There's not a lot of time to talk so in that short amount of time they tell me they're rooting for me and that they're so happy to see me That's such a big energy boost It's not something you do just out of obligation -You get more from it? -Yeah You get a lot of energy So this time... [Startled] For me, the energy... Hey, Taehyung [Taehyung dropped in] What are you doing here? Huh? Taehyung is here Oh, it's Taehyung We're in the middle of a shoot Could you please leave? [Haha] Don't you start promotions next week? [Excuse me] Yes Why aren't you grilling any meat? We were talking about something serious -Our music -It's too serious right now How did you know that we were filming? From the group chat I was working out when I heard Jung Kook [Just finished working out when he smelled hanwoo!] was filming SUCHWITA now [Even the staff didn't know he was coming] Are you doing a good job? [My little bro♥] I should always do a good job -Mind if I sit? -Sure, go ahead [Joins in naturally] Should I get some makeup done too? [Totally no makeup] No, you're good-looking anyway Jung Kook is the star today but here I am [Dropped in to support the youngest and have dinner] [So nice] -Taehyung, you want a drink too? -No thanks -You have to work out? -I was working out You're supposed to have a drink after working out [Abstaining from alcohol because the shoot was a week before his comeback!] [Really came to eat] [Hanwoo is protein] [Nom, nom] Since Taehyung can't drink I'll get you some zero cola [For V who's not drinking] -You have some? -Yeah [We have zero cola] You have everything Do you have ssamjang too? I'm not sure if we have that -So natural -Yeah [So natural like he's at home] He came in like someone who was waiting to eat They told me you guys were talking about music so I was just gonna watch for a bit then leave [Watching][Should I...][go now...] But then, you gave me some attention Okay, let's bring up the view count! -Let's go! Aim for 20 million! -Let's go! [SUCHWITA, let's go higher!] Wait, hang on! After my first show that day you went on Weverse Live [Said he wanted to be on stage again after the concert they did together] and talked for nearly two hours didn't you? [On live] Ah, I'm so bummed out I wish I could turn back time Yoongi, I'm sorry [Pat♥] Sorry, Yoongi Can I go again tomorrow? I don't mind going just for that [SUGA / No] I don't have to sing "Seven" [SUGA / Not tomorrow] [Feeling more bummed since he practiced in between his overseas promotions...] I couldn't get it out of my mind! But you did great! I'm the one who got overexcited and my voice cracked once No, no, no Your voice cracking is okay But for me, it was your concert! And I felt like I kind of spoiled it If I ever get to perform at your concert -Yeah -I'm gonna wreak havoc You do that [Please] Also, the real reason I went to your concert was because -you said you missed us -Yeah Since I'm on my own -honestly, it's kind of scary -Yeah, I think it would be [Last time on SUCHWITA] What's good about a team is that you can depend on the members beside you [Remembered SUGA saying he missed the members] Even if you don't do anything if the members are with you... I just wanted you to feel that again -because that's how I felt -Yeah The member I respect the most lately is Yoongi [Person he respects: Min Yoongi] I do too! Jimin came the next day and so did Namjoon They all talked about how nervous they felt I was so nervous too! Because it had been a while since they had been on stage I heard Namjoon's hands were shaking like this [Shake, shake] Yeah, so he held the mic with both hands [Leader's hands trembled as he held the mic] It really took me back a lot [Seeing that] Even when we performed in front of 50,000 or 60,000 people we used to be like "Let's just do it!" "Let's go, let's go!" and we'd just go up on stage [Used to perform captivating the audience] But then, there was about a year's break [Seeing them feel nervous to perform after a while] Seeing that I felt really grateful but also a little sad It kind of ached a little [Felt a little heartache] I loved performing that song with you! ♪ Burn it, burn it facing you in the deepest of places ♪ [When performing "Burn It (feat. MAX)"] -Looking at you -Where we were circling! I loved that [Spontaneous movement that wasn't planned] -We didn't plan any of that -Yeah, we didn't It just came out from our ten years of experience It just fell into place on stage? Yeah, but I really loved that part ♪ Burn it, burn it ♪ [Sending signal] ♪ Burn it, burn it facing you in the deepest of places ♪ [Signal received] ♪ Embarrassment, hatred, disgust and even rage ♪ [Grins] ♪ How futile all that is ♪ ♪ Maybe those are only mirages ♪ I had so much fun I can tell what you wanna do just by looking at you Just seeing the look in your eyes so we circled [Ten years, the time it takes to know the look in each other's eyes] You had good teamwork I felt so happy in that moment We were always like that even when we performed as a team I keep thinking about how fun it'll be when we're back together again and perform When we do [Grin] we'll devour the whole world! I can't wait for that moment, seriously [Older member grills the meat as always] [while the younger members eat...] [Like waiting for a familiar dinner] [Cheers] [Me too] [Cheers] We should talk a bit about your album It's called "GOLDEN" It's finally out Yeah In that photo I see you're wearing a jacket [Album cover] Jung Kook likes to raise his chin up! For "Seven" too It's because I don't look as good when I look at the camera like this So I need to lift it up a little [Lift] You look too much like a baby if you go like this I don't look that great if I do this [15-year-old Kookie] I see a bit of 15-year-old Kookie You look like a baby because you go like this [Head↓ Eyes↑] No, no, anyway the word "GOLDEN" [Satisfied] has come to be associated with me a lot Starting with Namjoon calling me "Golden Maknae" What do you want to show everyone through this album? I can rap, sing, and dance You're an all-rounder? I wouldn't say that Then, you're the Golden Maknae? -Am I? -Yeah, I keep telling you to go with that I'm the one who gave him the nickname "Golden Maknae," but he doesn't use it [It was a little embarrassing at first] Why won't you use such a great name? Hello, I'm BTS's Golden Maknae Jeon Jung Kook [Now, it's my favorite nickname] I think this period in my life is the golden time for me You'll have more times that are golden I'm just saying "Seven" did so great so I don't want to miss out on this golden period in my life That's what I wanted to capture in my album [A resolution to keep this golden period going] In my opinion, two or three more times like this will come I have to work for that -I think there will be at least five -I have to work harder for that to happen Also, as soon as I saw that cover I thought -"He's a true pop star"! -Yes! We finally have an Asian pop star [Oho!] -What's with that face? -Asian pop star [For the fans] Your title track is "Standing Next to You" It's your solo album's title track [Title track "Standing Next to You"] I recorded this with Andrew [Worked with Producer Andrew Watt] I recorded "Standing Next to You" the day after I recorded "Seven" After I was done recording "Seven"... Oh, so you already had the title track by then It wasn't the title track then It was just one of the songs on the list Yeah, just one of the songs that could be the title track Oh... I don't think I should talk about this It's okay It'll be edited out anyway Why talk about something that'll be edited out? [Oh...] If you're gonna argue can you take it outside? After I was done recording "Seven" I was listening to it and I was thinking it turned out good when Andrew came over and asked me if I wanted to listen to a few songs he had worked on [Andrew played him his songs] So he played one or two and one of them was "Standing Next to You" I told him I liked it and that I'd practice it by morning so that we could record it the next day [Practiced that evening and recorded it the next day] That's how it happened and how I recorded it [Our youngest, wow!] Let's listen to "Standing Next to You" [Title track of "GOLDEN" "Standing Next to You"] The song is really awesome [Shining through the retro punk] [is Jung Kook's groovy voice] Ah~ The sound? You did it again! [I agree] The song is really nice I heard three songs in total including "Seven" and I think you chose the songs really smartly -Right -I think you found your own style [A direction that makes the best of Jung Kook's strengths] It'd be so cool with a band! If I do a showcase or a concert I'd start off with a bang with this! [Wow!] Recording it was really tough It took me about four hours By the time it was over [Spaced out] I think the only person in Korea who can pull off pop this well is you Who'd think this song was sung by a Korean? I really should study English more My English is terrible [Mouth cave opens] It's bass and drums at the end [Bass and Drum] [Jung Kook in his most perfect form "Standing Next to You"] [Nice!] -So cool -No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 and 200 -at the same time Jung Kook, congrats -So awesome [Congrats in advance] I'll try to do my best once more Congratulations -Let's go -Let's go Let's go [Let's go higher] -Originally, it was a mini album -Right -EP -It was supposed to be an EP [Original plan was to release a mini album last summer] -With about five or six tracks -Yeah But it suddenly turned into an album with how many tracks? It suddenly became 11 tracks Yeah Huh? -It... It just happened -All of a sudden? Yeah At first, I just wanted to release a mini album with a few tracks that I really loved -You know I prefer getting songs -Yeah So I'd listen, and put the ones I liked on my tracklist and then I got "3D" So your favorite track became a single -Right, right -That's how it went So after I got the songs -I recorded them all at once -Yeah And it turned out to be 11 I only heard about your recording process this time around but I felt that you had upgraded to another level because you've gotten so much faster Yeah You've become so much faster I was really surprised [News of the youngest's recording speed traveled across the ocean] I recorded five songs in a week Yeah That means your voice was able to handle it Basically, I recorded one song a day Did you do three recording sessions a day? [1 session = 3.5 hours] -Did you record for nine hours a day? Eight? -Wow No, three hours a day Three hours? If you recorded one song per session... That means you've achieved unbelievable growth Yeah... That speed... It's unfathomable for those of you who don't know, it's insanely fast [Wink!] To give you some perspective... I record one song for three days It takes me three days [Confident][Confident] It's not a matter of how capable you are It's more a matter of style [Type that works fast] [Type that works meticulously] At his speed, he's probably singing through verse one then tweaking a few things here and there then moving on to verse two and tweaking a few things there too [Sings verse 2 then goes over the whole song] -That would amount to three hours -Right, right So I'd finish up recording in one day The next day, we'd retouch it Then the next day I'd record the next song So I recorded for five days straight -Your album has 11 tracks -Yes, 11 tracks When you were choosing the 11 tracks what was most important to you? Why did it have to be those tracks? -The key theme -There must've been key points [Assistant MC] was the most universal emotion of all Love So all the songs in my album are about love They're all about love There's a context to it too [Listed the songs according to overall context] I'll just tell you about them in order "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" "Closer to You (feat. Major Lazer)" "Seven (feat. Latto) - Explicit Ver." "Standing Next to You" Then it's "Yes or No" And "Please Don't Change (feat. DJ Snake)" -"Please Don't Change" -Yes Those songs are all about when you are in love so they're all uptempo Then from track seven, "Hate You" it's about breakups You suddenly fell out of love It goes from being upbeat [From the moment of falling in love to the breakup] to a more sentimental vibe [A collection of various emotions about love] When you're producing an album... Can I get some ice? You can't help but be really conscious about the number of tracks and the genre Yeah Because albums, mini albums and singles are all different in nature Right, right, right Releasing an album means that [SUGA's glass is empty] you're... Oh, thank you -You're ready to go on tour -Yeah [Releasing an album means you're ready to tour] And when you're coming up with a setlist it means you can add the songs you want to Artists who have released at least two albums [Here's some ice] then start releasing mini albums [Thanks!] Because then, you can just change up a few songs on the setlist -Swap out a few -Like changing up the order Couldn't he put on concerts with the number of songs he has now? He could! With the number of songs he has... Instead of a concert I'm doing a showcase I think I'll wrap things up with one showcase [Will be putting on a showcase for ARMY this time] Then you'll be doing about 12 to 13 songs? Yeah, practically the entire album -Where are you holding the showcase? -At Jangchung Arena [November 20th, Jangchung Arena] I hope as many ARMY as possible can be there Yeah, since I'm doing the showcase for ARMY I'll do my absolute best so that they can have the best time possible [Not enough words to express how proud we are of our youngest's growth] So this album... You've released singles or previously unreleased songs before but this is basically your first album [First solo album] Yes, it's my first How does it feel releasing your first album? [Q. How does it feel releasing your first solo album?] I did hear you were feeling some pressure I do feel that I could've done better In the recording? Just overall... Because I really did the best I could but if I had done my best just a little sooner -No -I wonder how it would've been You know I've released a lot of albums but just because you've prepared for it for a long time -Doesn't mean it turns out well? -that doesn't mean it turns out well So when it's time to start you just have to let go and move on You won't know the result until time passes I haven't experienced it for myself yet so even when you tell me things like that I don't entirely get it but I still try to move on from those feelings of not having done enough Now that I'm releasing an album I kind of feel excited This is when you have the most fun Yeah, and the genres are so diverse ["GOLDEN" has diverse genres] I wonder which song people will like the most and I also changed my voice tone a little while recording each song I noticed in "Standing Next to You" your voice sounded really solid Right, right There are songs like that but in "Hate You" I sound really sad I'm really breathy You can hear all that [Even recorded his breath full of emotion] I wonder what people will like the most and I want to be recognized for my work too but I wonder if I will be [An album that captures diverse emotions] [What did you think of "GOLDEN"?] You're the last one to release a solo album [Last one in BTS to release a solo album] -Right -Why don't you say a word toward the camera for ARMY who are waiting for 2025? [A word for ARMY] Actually, I'm a little mad at myself [Why?] I was able to record my album really quickly but after our group promotions were over I feel like I took it too easy I didn't forget you but I do want to say I'm sorry about that That's why I worked really hard on this album and since they're songs about love I hope you'll be able to gain a lot of comfort from them And I'd like to show you more awesome sides of me so that you can be proud of me Honestly my first tattoo was of you guys It was you, and I'd like to be by your side all the way to the end Let's be happy! Since Taehyung suddenly dropped in too why don't you say a word to ARMY who are waiting for 2025? [Me...?] [You're the best!] You didn't say anything Jung Kook already said the cool stuff I just... We've already made so many memories with ARMY over the years but I'd like to make more in 2025 So if you can just wait for us a little longer... We'll come back more awesome than ever This is not fair [We are so thankful and happy that you are by our side] [Let's always be happy for years to come by SUGA] Thanks for dinner! Jung Kook, our first guest who volunteered to be on the show again Stay until the closing! I enjoyed the meal [Got plenty of protein] It was great protein The two of us will wrap up then You just came to eat protein? Make the ending cool [To. V Thank you for coming as a surprise guest] -See you -I'll be back on SUCHWITA! Jung Kook, our first guest who volunteered to be on the show again Yes! And Taehyung, our other guest who suddenly dropped in after working out was here too How was it today? I loved our conversation today As I mentioned before out of all the members I respect [Person he respects, Min Yoongi] you're at the top these days [Embarrassed] I just wanted to talk to you about my music one more time so that's why I came on the show today [A precious conversation with SUGA] We can always talk comfortably and meet up anytime I was really happy today When you were here to talk about your single last time there was only one song to talk about music-wise -so it was a little hard -Yeah -That's why we sang and stuff -Right, right But now that you've released an album with 11 tracks... How long has it been since you were last here? Only about three or four months, right? -Three months -Three or four months [Three months exactly based on the recording date] But in that time, it feels like you've gone up another level No, another two levels [Youngest returned after more growth] We've been talking about it [Hehe♥] and it feels like you have a lot more of your own babies now [Musically] Yeah, and you knew that I wanted to hear what you had to say when it all came together I can't wait to see how much more of an awesome artist you'll become [Huh?] -♪ Happy birthday to you ♪ -Huh? Was it yesterday? -Two days ago? Is today the 3rd? -Two days ago -Two days ago, right? -It's the 3rd -♪ Happy belated birthday ♪ -Hey -Belated thanks -♪ Happy birthday dear Jung Kook ♪ ♪ Happy birthday to you ♪ [Makes a wish!] Okay What's that? This is your birthday present [Birthday present for our Jung Kook] -A birthday present? What is it? -Sneakers, your favorite -Size 280 -There are three? One's for you Thanks for the gift What is it? For Jung Kook's birthday [One for Taehyung] Sneakers, so that you'll fly even higher Let's go Le Mouton, an eco-friendly shoe brand -Le Mouton -Le Mouton We got it by express delivery because Taehyung suddenly dropped in -Thank you -We got it by express delivery [Thank you advertiser♥] Wear these and run far -Yes -Keep going forward [Hoping he keeps going forward] -You should fly high -Yes Le Mouton This is the "Mate" line -They look really comfy -BTS's soul-mate -It's eco-friendly which is really important these days -Eco-friendly [Plus, it's eco-friendly] They'd be nice to wear on most days or when I work out If you check out the cushioning it's really comfy So, when we practice... [This is nice] This is nice After the shoot I have a fitting, then practice I should wear these Wear them whenever Le Mouton Le Mouton, Le Mouton [Going home for real] -Thank you -Enjoy them And happy birthday Thanks [Nom] I wished you a happy birthday in our group chat too but you seem so busy these days You barely have time to sleep [Felt concerned about the youngest who has been spending a hectic time] That reminds me Your text in our group chat was the most moving of all! "Jung Kook, I hope you have the happiest day today" I always say things like that on your birthday I kind of see it now [How you feel] -You see it now that you're older, right? -Yeah, I do, I do I mean, it's not like it's the first time I'm feeling these emotions but I think they've become more clear I just want our team BTS to be together for as long as we can In the way ARMY wants... Staying true to ourselves I hope we don't forget that Recently, I've been thinking more about the team Yeah Things aren't unilateral when you're on a team There's a central point and everyone stands around it -And we look toward it together -Right, right [A team looks toward the same direction] Someone doesn't go ahead and say things aren't a certain way [No one is in the front leading] We have to look at things together and resolve things together That's what I've been feeling recently [That's what a team is] I just keep thinking more and more about the team If we want to explode with energy in 2025... Yeah, I feel the same way People will be waiting for us Let's be happy -Yeah, now sign your autograph... -Let's try not to get injured... Smile and be happy And bring in the year 2025 [Let's meet again smiling happily] -Bangtan, Bangtan -Bangtan ♪ Happy birthday to BTS ♪ BTS Si-hyuk! We came in first place! [There have been lots of changes but we haven't changed] [For our second "Most Beautiful Moment in Life"] "To. SUCHWITA [Signing his autograph] Let's be happy" [To. SUCHWITA BTS JK Let's be happy] -Anyway -I had a great time today Don't forget to take the sneakers They're from me. Take them home [Pat...] Le Mouton -Great job, everyone -Great job, everyone [Rooting for our Golden Maknae's GOLDEN TIME that will last forever] Thanks for the cake But you know... Jung Kook is the star today I'll be back on SUCHWITA at another time -You'll be back too? You have more to say? -You'll be back? Your episode hasn't even aired yet Well... Does there have to be something new to be on the show? Yes, there has to be something new -Really? -Yeah Yeah, there has to be something new If you want to be on the show just to drink with me wouldn't it just be better to meet up in private? videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA (Time to drink with SUGA)] [This video is sponsored by ROUND AROUND] [Autumn rain] [Autumn rain and] [Autumn rain and fragrance] There's an amazing fragrance in the studio That great fragrance is [(feat. ROUND AROUND)] Matcha [A clean autumn matcha scent just like today's guest] The vibe today is warm and fuzzy I'll invite our guest who's perfect for today's vibe [(Getting his pumps in)] Today's conversation is set to be very comfortable more than ever Name: V Occupation: the most handsome and most beautiful face in the world Number 1 male idol perfect for a coffee commercial The Gui***ss Book of World Records holder of the fastest social media following in the world It's doesn't matter if you're a rock or an old man I'm here to meet SUGA whom I'll put in my pocket Taehyung! Hehe Why are you so nervous Taehyung? Hello Take a seat [(V)] [The combination of all the charming words in the world] [BTS V] Nice to see you I heard rumors that you got really nervous about appearing on "SUCHWITA" Yeah, I got really nervous I heard you watched every episode of our members! How do you feel about being here? [Thoughts on appearing on SUCHWITA] Ha... Yes Isn't it your first time as a solo guest on a talk show? Yeah... I was getting my hair and makeup done when I received the news that he's so nervous for this [I'm nervous] Yeah... How were the other members' episodes? Because I love our members I saw all of their episodes but now that it's my turn the thought of me doing that(?) as well... Made me really nervous! And I felt the pressure [(So cute♡)] What do you mean by pressure? You just have to talk casually But I saw that each member had their own style Yeah, each guest is different Because each member had their own style [(Pressure 1230 percent)] Would just drinking with SUGA be enough? It's totally enough! -Oh, really? -Yeah So I brought some alcohol What did you bring? At first... I bet it's wine Yeah, it's wine... It's alcohol [Wine that V drinks often] that I drink all the time [Ru**ian Jack] Oh, this is the wine that I talked about when Shin Dong-yup came on the show [The wine SUGA recommended Dong-yup] I had it for the first time at your house and it was really good [Ru**ian Jack - A New Zealand white wine with tropical fruit flavor and fresh herb aroma] so I always have some at my house [Wine he had for the first time at V's house] I have about 50 bottles of this at my house Taehyung used to not drink alcohol at all I never drank So I did that What? Fruit soju was how I got started That's right When fruit soju was popular [(Grapefruit soju)] Whoa! [A special move as soon as it's brought out] How did you do that? [V tries to drink it with style but spills everything...] But he couldn't get the hype going until the end I thought I could drink it so fruit soju was how I started drinking [Started with sweet fruit soju] But people laughed at me so much! -We didn't laugh at you! -And they looked down on me...! -We didn't laugh at you! -They looked down on me -We didn't laugh at you! -"You call that alcohol?" So I wanted to drink something that people would approve of [To get the approval of the older members] -So I started drinking wine -Then let's have a glass of wine [V started drinking wine] and talk [Cheers] We prepared jamón and melon because you like them [Today's menu - Jamón and gambas that V likes] Our staff were so touched after doing the pre-interview You're the only member who sincerely answered every question Oh, really? [Thank you] They usually don't answer much! -They're like, "Let's just do it!" -I usually would do that [The members know so much about each other that they don't need to do a pre-interview] but since it's a talk show! It's different depending on whether it's being filmed or not [Pressure because it's not a private setting] As you know, it'll get edited anyway You can say all the weird things It's been tough Once this episode of SUCHWITA gets released Taehyung's solo album -That's right -will have been released to the world [V's solo album was released on Sept. 8th] It's finally out! -Yeah, finally -I remember clearly that you started working on this album around 2-3 years ago -That's right -"SUGA, I'm gonna release an album" -Yeah -"My album's getting released soon" "I'm working on it" are all things I heard 2-3 years ago [While the solo project was in the making for a long time] I think it's been 3 years [Since he's worked on the songs] -The songs you let me listen to in the beginning -Yeah, I did are they all in the album? [(Nope)] I always wrote the lyrics in gibberish and the melodies too... But I couldn't complete the songs so I got so stressed from that so I decided to receive songs So I received a song that I fell in love with The title of the album is "Layover" Yeah [Layover - A short transfer after staying within 24 hours at a stopover] I gathered all the tracks that fit -the title "Layover" the best -The producer of this album [Made up of sentimental songs] -is Min Hee-jin (ADOR), right? -That's right The vibe was so much better than I had expected It was a first for me! Yeah, because we don't get the chance -to work with outside producers often -Yeah ["Layover" is a different output made through a different process] This album is the last solo album to be put out by the BTS members That's right You're the last one -I'm feeling so much pressure -Yeah! Everyone was like, "I don't want to be last" But if I didn't like it, I wouldn't have released it Yeah! I would've said "I'm sorry, but I can't" but I really do like it [The songs of "Layover" passed V's high standards] If you see each members' albums and their promotions, you can see their individual styles I'm sure the album consists of songs that you really like That's right! The title track is "Slow Dancing" Yes Please tell us about the song I want to play it for you more than introduce it Oh, that's why you posted on social media... -It said, "Dancing (Slow)" -Oh, that's... -Was it a spoiler? It was, right? -It was... [No way] It was a spoiler I was working out and since Namjoon writes his workout sets in a such a cool way I wrote down "Dancing" [To look cool] But then I was like, "Slow Dancing"? So I put "Slow" in parentheses [Added a cute spoiler] Let's listen to it then! Okay I think I'll know when I hear it [A 70s soul sound that goes perfectly with wine] [With V's signature unique voice] ["Slow Dancing" brings up images of dancing slow just like the title suggests] -You made it into a style people can comfortably listen to -Yeah Is the whole album this vibe? Yeah! There aren't any songs that are powerful or overdone They're songs that I can comfortably listen to Songs that capture my emotions compared to those of BTS It gives Kim Taehyung [One-sentence review] If we make music as BTS -because everyone's vocal range is different -Yeah [To fit the tone of the vocal line] a lot of times you can't sing in the range you're comfortable with It's nice, right? I love that this is the sound you are making with ease Are you going to do promotions? [Q. What's the plan for this album promotion?] Yeah! [(Nom)] -I'm gonna do music shows -Oh, music shows? I'm gonna do music shows You're doing music shows? And just Yo**be content Since this album is just showing who I am [Focused on showing the singer "Kim Taehyung"] I don't think I'll do anything grand You should show off your idolness at music shows Here with you live! Music! -Bank! -Bank! Hello! We have BTS' V on the show today [(The 4th gen Bank President)] Ta-da! Hello! 2! 3! BANGTAN! Hello, this is BTS! Nice to see you "Layover" consists of these songs [The interview skills of an 11-year idol] People around me tell me often that you're the epitome of an idol Haha! Stop it! [Synonym of "idol"] [V] [Falling in Love CAM] [Source: CJ ENM] [Did you know?] [20 seconds have just gone by watching V's face] I'll go tighten up the slack That's why I'm like... Right? It's like... Right? I'm idols'... Right? A lot of times I... Right? So many idols saw you and thought... Right? "I want to be like V" Oh man! Oh, stop it! [(Embarrassed)] Here with you live! Music! -Bank! -Bank! Hello! [Always ready] It's V of BTS [The epitome of an idol] ARMY, please wait -just a bit! -"Just a bit!" is what you have to say But ever since we were young, I would say "Make a lot of your own music" "You'll learn a lot through it" "Work on it a lot" I said this all the time [The nagging second-oldest brother] but now you've released your first solo album [It's V's first album on his own] You must've listened to the mastered version, right? Yes How did you feel? "I'm finally done with it" That's how it felt Because the song could be a bit boring if the tone is too low [The vocal range] so I was really worried about that But the songs in the mastered version got tied together really well [This album really highlights V's unique low tones] So I was happy But your vocal range isn't low! That's right It's not low but it feels like you've found the tone that you're comfortable in That's right! Because for our team, we find the middle ground [Harmony with the group is important for group promotions] Thanks to our group promotions I was able to record my solo album with more refined vocals So thanks to our team, my vocal range Got a lot higher! I think by an octave You got past the 3rd octave! -It's just... -During "Dynamite" It's like... But it's like... ["Layover" reflects the improvements he's made through group promotions] "Layover" consists of six songs so let's listen to another one! Let's listen to "Love Me Again" [The next song] "Love Me Again"? Taehyung said he wanted juice so we've prepared some juice [(Strawberry banana)] [A song where you can feel V's unique sense of rhythm] [The song that best captures the charms of V's low tones] It's really different from what I expected It's more public-friendly! I thought you'd bring something with more jazz or blues but you've gone all the way here [A pop R&B genre that you can listen to comfortably] That theme comes later in the album [That SUGA mentioned] This is nice too I love that you're singing comfortably I've leveled up! The vibes of this solo album... I'm burning it up with vibes Wait, there are six tracks total and there are five MVs? Yes From the start, no matter what I thought I should shoot an MV for all the tracks -From the start? -Yes There's so much I want to do If I shoot this and this and all of this, I would have to shoot 8 MVs [MVs for all the songs / V's thought since a long time ago] Because for me... There's an image in my head of each song No matter how light it is I wanted a video for each one... [Wanted to capture that image in a video to convey to others] -You shot a different MV for each one! -Yeah [Five MVs!] I shot them all in Spain... In a period of one and a half weeks or two When I listen to your solo songs or the songs you've worked on -there's this unique calm vibe of Taehyung -Yeah [V's vibes are shown in his works] It seems like you like this kind of music [Calm, comfortable] but BTS' music... But it's not that you don't go well with BTS' music -There's "Blue & Grey" -Yeah, "Blue & Grey" too ["Blue & Grey" that V participated in] But as for the title tracks [He showed his charms in the team] we usually do dance tracks [but he's a shining idol in BTS] so I wonder if that caused any collisions [while he's calm in his solo album] -internally for you -I think [Was there collision between the two?] that me as a shining idol is for group performances I think that's the best version of me I can show when it's the seven of us Like "Run BTS" or "ON," these powerful performances have allowed me to feel such great pleasure so many times so when I'm doing things on my own rather than with the team I don't think I can feel the joy as much So I boldly let go of it [Let go of powerful performances this time] Of course, ARMY would like to see me do that but I'll think about it slowly It's the same for me I've done three solo studio albums but my musical colors and vibes keep changing [Musical colors are bound to change] And as I go on tour I think of new directions to take in terms of my music [SUGA improved musically and so did his thoughts while being on tour] Because we have so many opportunities to show it -It's not like we only do one genre of music -That's right Compared to the music I've let you listen to -This album is really different? -the feel of this album may be different [A completely different feel] but as time goes by this is the musical color I keep going to Yeah! You need to try to know -You need to release it to know -I need to try it to keep listening to it and I realized I need to think, "Would I be able to make this type of music?" So as I did it, I found that it was fun Our team is cool in that the charms of all seven of us are so different and we all have different things we're good at so I thought us being together brought about really good synergy [Synergy forged for each other from being "BTS"] -But that's what I find so cool! -Yeah We're so different musically! [The seven of them] The music we want to make is so different [Their musical colors are so different individually] But if those styles were all similar I bet it would've been weird Yeah When I listen to our members' singles or albums everyone's colors are different Yeah But these people became one team [The seven of them became BTS] It was so good that the seven of us met... Good people gathered together And what I can see from our solo tracks is when we gather together I think the charms of the songs will double But for real, I can't imagine what will happen when we gather together after our solo endeavors Because we're so different Have you ever imagined this before? We do a concert as a group and then it's time to do our solo performances But our solo tracks are stacked! Our set list would be incredible Our set list would be stacked! I'm so excited for it [So excited for the future in 2025] when all seven of us gather together [When we gather together again] I wonder what our colors will be then [What colors would the seven of them have?] Long time ago... I think Hobi said this that we need to do our own individual things so that when we gather together again our colors will be more distinct After hearing that I felt this after releasing my album last but I think BTS' musical colors will be even more distinct than before [RM "Wild Flower (feat. youjeen)"] [Jin "The Astronaut"] [Agust D "Haegeum"] [j-hope "on the street (with J.Cole)"] [Jung Kook "Seven (feat. Latto)"] [Jimin "Like Crazy"] [V "Slow Dancing"] [What distinct colors will BTS' music show?] I saw that there are ARMY who think Chapter 2 is about us taking our shirts off They did show some skin... Jung Kook had his shirt off [(Took his shirt off)] And so did Jimin [(Took his shirt off too)] But I repeat... Chapter 2 has nothing to do with taking our shirts off During our 10th Anniversary FESTA -I saw "Le Jazz de V" while I was on tour -Really? [Produced "Le Jazz de V" as a gift for their 10th Anniversary FESTA] What impact does jazz have on your music life? -For me, it's encouragement -Encouragement? Yes The first time I encountered jazz was when I learned the saxophone I was forced to learn it -For college admission, right? -Yeah, I was forced to for college [Encountered jazz and saxophone for college] I hated it back then but after time went by I was like, "Whoa! I know this song!" So I kept listening to jazz and now it's a source of encouragement You played violin before too! Yeah, I learned how to play violin Violin! I have to tell that story -Was it Paris (while on tour)? -Yeah We were on tour in Paris [(Yeah...)] I went out to the balcony and this guy! He was on the balcony playing the violin! [A night in Paris, and Kim Taehyung (with violin)] -It was so funny! -SUGA! It was the vibes I have a video of that Ambience! Ambience! But the sound was like squeak... squeak... [Twinkle twinkle little star / Video provided by j-hope] [How I wonder what you are] Ambience... You're a true Parisian I personally think you're one of the most musically ambitious members But all seven of us are very musically ambitious Our ambition for music is incredible! Something I still remember is when we started off as trainees most of the members had never made music before No one made music before except the three rapper line members But the other members always told me that they were thankful we made that environment to get everyone to make music It was no joke [(Of course!)] You, Namjoon, and j-hope You guys would sit the four of us down [Sat the four vocal line members down] "Listen to some music..." Namjoon cried while saying that! "Listen to some music!!" "How can a singer not listen to music!" So Namjoon and the rapper line members organized music into a USB We used USBs back then [(That's how it was)] But something I can take pride in myself is that I listen to more music than anyone in the world You listen to music so much! I listen to new music every day! Congratulating Jung Kook and talking about how we've been [This and that] Our preferences have been different since we were young but our chemistry started in our trip to Hawaii in 2016 Our chemistry shined in our trip to Hawaii [A shockingly novel combo of SUGA & V / BTS Bon Voyage Season 2] SUGA and V would be really new [Strongly recommended by the members] [The legendary Hawaiian buddies were formed] -This necklace is too thick -When we go to Incheon, you have to wear this [Matching items even though they're awkward with each other] This one? At the time we thought that if we kept being this busy and couldn't sleep... Yeah, now everything's good! -It's fun now -Because I know myself now [The members got to know themselves after resting so they enjoy it now] [(Refill)] It's... Of course I do think we all get burned out once in a while Even the energetic Namjoon had to rest for a while Yeah, when I was okay Namjoon was really down Yeah, so it was like [Seeing the drained members] "Huh?" [he thought, "What's wrong?"] And it's like, "Was I like that too?" [Hits close to home] Yeah, it's like, "Was I like that too?" Seeing that, I realized that we've really become family A team always consists of individuals with their own discomforts That's why I realized that everyone has their own standards We just need one central standard and have everyone match it Just us seven need to match it All seven of us are so different Just look at our albums! Someone's doing hip hop someone's doing rock someone's doing pop someone's doing jazz pop We're so different We're all different like this [Everyone has their own style] -but our team is the first priority for us -That's right Because we love and cherish -our team as BTS -Yeah I think now we just need to protect that central base with our individual abilities In the past, we had no peace of mind There were things we had to do for our team So many things But now it's not as difficult as before [Now when everyone's promoting solo] All we need to do is one thing [One thing to keep in mind!] That's all we need to do as we do our own stuff [That BTS is one!] I think that's Chapter 2 for us [That's how their Chapter 2 will begin] For the past 10 years -we've worked harder than anyone -It was intense! so now I love seeing our members relaxed and comfortable But that's because we've been through all sorts of hardships One thing I can confidently say is that BTS worked harder than anyone for the past 10 years We gave everything we got in our twenties We gave it our all literally There's a question I ask our members when they appear on SUCHWITA If you can go back in time or to the future... Wow! [Ta-da] Thank you! Smell it, it's no joke It's so nice [(It sprays really well too♡)] I heard it's a great gift since you're promoting soon It's made by a world-class perfumer from France so the fragrance is really luxurious [Ta-da again] There's a number written here What does it mean? The type of fragrance! Smell it It's amazing This is a mist Wow There's depth to it! Wait It's a really rich smell It has that hint of woodiness from matcha at the end It's a fragrance guys and girls will all like [ROUND AROUND is a mist that everyone will like] Lastly, please sign here and it'll be displayed over there [Time for an autograph] What I learned today is you're really good at this! videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA Time to drink with SUGA] [This content is brought to you by L'OCCITANE and Easy Tomorrow] It was the middle of winter when SUCHWITA started and now it's spring already [Spring is here at SUCHWITA] While hoping that SUCHWITA will still be here in the coming seasons let's see who booked a table [Who is today's guest?] Name, Jimin Occupation, a calico cat raising SUGA "Hello, I'm a regular viewer of SUCHWITA I'm so honored to be on a show that I enjoy watching Bro, I'm here!" Jimin! Yo ♪ Happy birthday to you ♪ You didn't have to do this ♪ Happy birth-- ♪ [Both sexy and cute] [A singer with beautiful dance moves and a unique timbre] [Back with his first solo album "FACE"] [BTS Jimin] ♪ Dear SUGA ♪ [A surprise event for SUGA whose birthday is in March] [Puff!] Good One of our regular viewers [A regular viewer of SUCHWITA] is here [Fascinated] You said so many nice things about SUCHWITA on Weverse live yesterday Hearing all the good things that the guests talk about on the show it feels like they're saying them to us so I feel all warm inside I don't know how it is for other people but for us, SUCHWITA is a great program I started watching without expecting much [Choke] but the lineup of guests became bigger that it is a lot of fun to watch But the space is smaller than I thought it would be -It's cozy -Yeah [Cozy] I thought it would be much bigger -It's not -But it's not You don't need a lot of space for two people to talk It looked really big in the videos [Our regular viewer finds everything fascinating♡] I was at the office when you were on live Oh yeah? I was going to barge in but then it was over... I was on for over an hour though [Disappointed] You said your occupation is being a calico cat raising SUGA Is this it, the marimo? Yes, my SUGA This is SUGA This is SUGA [During Weverse Live, Jimin made a house for his marimo and named it "SUGA"] SUGA, did you sleep well? Does that grow? We need that We don't invade each other's space So, I really hope you wrap things up well [Hope you wrap up promotions for "FACE" really well] No matter how hard you work you can't always work hard constantly for 10 years Sometimes I worked a little harder and sometimes a little less [The amount of hard work wasn't always the same] but while working on my solo album I clearly saw areas where I was lacking and I'm trying to bring up the level of hard work again [Bringing up the level of hard work again] I just really want to do a good job You always do a good job I know what you mean but If I'm being really objective [From an objective viewpoint not the members'] I just want to grow more [I want to grow into a singer who can make an impact] and hear people say that I'm someone who can make an impact I never thought you weren't good enough Thanks [A genius of hard work] [created through an immense about of effort] [My familiar story, FACE] A while ago, you went to visit Jin [j-hope & Jimin recently visited Jin] -I couldn't go because of a prior engagement -I know How is he? Is he doing okay? He's 66kg Jin Isn't that the most he's weighed in his entire life? -Yeah, he never went over 63kg before -Right He's getting healthier We even ate together I had jjajangmyeon and he said he was craving mulhwe [Mulhwe for Jin] He kept talking about mulhwe in our group chat That's all he talked about But also, the week before... He had mulhwe again? One of our staff went to visit and bought it for him [Already had mulhwe with staff] But he wanted to have mulhwe again and called me Is he being haunted by a ghost because he couldn't eat mulhwe? [Mulhwe ghost] Why does he like it so much? He always said he wanted mulhwe even when we went to TV stations He misses us so much [Looking for a photo of Jin] But why does this keep... [Ring-♬] [Isn't this song...?] [Chu! I'm sorry for being cute♡] [I'm sorry...] [For being cute...] Things are hilarious when I'm with the members We all look nuts [Beautiful friends] when we're together I laughed so much my throat is hoarse I wanted to talk about that because even though you were so busy -you went to Lollapalooza to show support -Yeah [Showed support for j-hope at Lollapalooza] You always go to support the members [Goes anywhere to show support for members] Yeah What does the team BTS mean for you? [Q. What does BTS mean for Jimin?] There are no words to describe it BTS is family now Family of different blood Actually... -Want another drink? -Just one more I had an interview today and they asked if my thoughts about the members had changed in any way [Have thoughts about the members changed?] That's what they asked Whether my thoughts have changed or not [Changed or not] I never thought of the members in that way It's kind of like that question "What do your fans mean to you?"] ["What does ARMY mean to you?"] "What does your dad mean to you?" He's just my dad [Dad is just dad] Exactly -Members are just members -Dad is just dad It's weird trying to explain it [No explanation is needed] Yeah [Members are my family] SUCHWITA's same question for everyone -I know what it is -Time for the last drink Instead of as Jimin of BTS does the person Park Jimin have dreams? [Q. What is the dream of Park Jimin, the person?] If I'm being perfectly honest if that division is made, then I don't think I do I don't think I have separate dreams [Park Jimin the person and Park Jimin of BTS] -as a person and a singer -Yeah So, making that differentiation and asking that question is kind of meaningless Oh, I asked a meaningless question? -That's not what I meant -Got it Let's wrap up SUCHWITA now What is wrong with him? I can't act like this with other guests Yeah, I saw I'm really polite [A polite person] I know, when Lee Sung-min was here you could hardly eat [Practically starved] So, what I want to say is I don't have a separate dream My only dream is to make this team last a long time [Only dream is to be part of BTS for a long time] Until what age? Until I can barely move Personally, even when we're old I think it'd be nice if the seven of us were sitting around with our fans sitting too [ARMY is sitting too] Just talking and singing [Just hang out and sing] Wouldn't we be over 80 then? With everyone sitting... But you still have to swear and rap At 80? What would my grandkids think of me? [Grandpa Daechwita is swearing!] [The trainee who was the last to join] [The trainee who was always last to go home] [Jimin gained six family members] [Worked hard for 10 years with his family] [Even if I have to be on my own for a while] [I know that in the end I have a family who loves me] Since your first solo album is coming out I got a present for you [Prepared a present] A present From L'OCCITANE [L'OCCITANE gift set] I've heard of it It's a home mist and pillow mist [Relaxing pillow mist & purifying home mist] It's a mist to spray on your pillow Oh, really? And a fragrance for your home Can I open it now? -Smell it -I'm so curious Is this the one for pillows? -This one is pillow mist -The pillow mist -is for spraying on your pillow -Okay -And the home mist is for rooms -It's nice! It's nice L'OCCITANE fragrances are the best [Whiff] It's a forest scent [A home mist that smells like the forest] You know what I mean? Oh, yeah It really smells like trees [IN THE SOOP as soon as it's sprayed] The pillow mist -I really like it -is lavender [Pillow mist smells like lavender] You have a hard time sleeping during promotions Spray the pillow mist and you'll smell lavender [Try it] What? What's so funny? [LOL] It's relaxing That's what lavender does I really appreciate it but the way you're kindly explaining everything -feels so weird -Give it to me. Give it -You're gonna take it for yourself -I won't L'OCCITANE [Fragrances are L'OCCITANE] [2nd oldest member's product placement to keep the younger members warm] Pillow mist and... I knew it [Deeply moved] Room spray [Signing his autograph] "To SUCHWITA, I had a great time" Are you ready? -Let's do this -Let's do this We look like grandpas We look like grandpas Let's stop We look too old I can't do this Why do people do this? I seem like an old man that wants to do TikTok Why is this trending? -I don't know -I don't get it Anyway, Jimin I hope "FACE" is a huge hit [To. Jimin I hope there is always a smile on your face while promoting "FACE"] Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo
