videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA] [Time to drink with SUGA] [This content is brought to you by Hanyang Hwaro] It's been a while but we're back with SUCHWITA I had my last concert in Seoul two days ago and came to record SUCHWITA right away [Host came straight to SUCHWITA after his Seoul concert] It feels like I'm back home after a long time [Congrats] Our guest today is a really, really, really energetic guy so I'm excited Name, Jeon Jung Kook Occupation, BTS's golden maknae and will still be even at the age of 60 "I've been constantly saying that I wanted to be on SUCHWITA but seriously... It took five months for Yoongi to finally invite me I'm so upset!" [JK / Yoongi won't give me an answer I'm so upset!] Jung Kook Come on in It's great to see you [BTS Jung Kook] [BTS's golden maknae] [A talented guy who makes the members laugh] [and an irreplaceable genius vocalist] [He's back with his solo single "Seven (feat. Latto)"] [BTS Jung Kook] You changed the lyrics to "Daechwita" while streaming live [Fan who changed the lyrics of "Daechwita" for SUCHWITA♡] and generated a lot of buzz for SUCHWITA Why'd it take so long to invite me? That's why I specially prepared a karaoke machine for you [A karaoke machine just for Jung Kook] I don't know if I'll sing though -Maybe I will after a few drinks -Yeah [He did] [Super energetically] You need to sing in places like this to get a lot of views [Got it] Got it? [Flashes a V here too] There are more cameras than I expected! It's been a while since you've been on a variety show Yeah It's hard to get used to, right? You mentioned SUCHWITA a lot though and you even reviewed Jimin's episode live on Weverse Yeah And after seeing us do the "sorry for being cute challenge" you made a face saying "What is wrong with Yoongi?" Yeah [Hey, this song...?] [Chu! Sorry for being cute♡] [Sorry...] [for being cute...] SUGA! Hello [I'm watching] Wow, it's been so long I think I'd just hang up I can't watch [Jung Kook really stopped watching] Yoongi, what is wrong with you? What were you thinking? Uh, anyway That was then [Quickly changes the subject] I invited you because you wanted me to You said you had a really nice drink -Yeah -So, did you bring it? It's something I drink often -Highball -Highball [Highball / A cocktail made with a spirit mixed with a carbonated beverage or water with ice] I like highballs Are you good at making them? I just make them to my liking Even when doing live... [Springs up] Why do you keep doing that? To prevent muscle loss The last time we had drinks with just the two of us was that time at my place Yeah, at your place We had wine Yeah, it's been so long [Their very own wine meetup] That was when I wrote "People Pt.2" Oh -That day -It was that day! We just suddenly started writing a song while drinking [Jung Kook sang for the guide demo of "People Pt.2"] It's been a while since just the two of us had drinks [Their first time since that day!] I never expected to be drinking here Should we have a drink first? [SUGA & Jung Kook's highball recipe] [1. Add ice to the glass to chill it] [2. Add a shot of whisky of your liking] [A little more for Jung Kook...] [3. Fill up the glass with carbonated water] [4. Squeeze a slice of lemon and add it as garnish] [5. Stir to mix] [The glass of highball is ready to drink] The two of us drinking was on TV once When we were in Malta -Right -Friendship is drinking Irish slammers -Irish slammers -Yeah [A clean] [chug] [Another chug] Friendship is what? Drinking Irish slammers Then today, let's say friendship is drinking highballs Friendship is drinking highballs Since you said we'd be drinking highballs today I prepared beef This is from Hanyang Hwaro [Hanyang Hwaro] [Outside skirt] [Chuck tail flap] [Wow] Looks amazing They're a super popular place right now Dong-seok is the model for their ads [Dong-seok just happens to be the model♡] They use charcoal grills Their restaurants use charcoal grills but we can't here since its indoors [Charcoal grills at their restaurants] Looks good Is it tastier with a charcoal grill? A lot tastier! You wanna grill it since you like meat? [Knows how to eat] Mmm -The marbling is nice! -Yeah [An electric grill instead of a charcoal grill on SUCHWITA!] Oh, yeah Looks so good Yum, it's good -It's good? -Yeah I heard you're doing intermittent fasting these days? Yes, apparently it's good for your health I was looking up info on diets [※Consult a relevant specialist first※] and learned everything there is to know about intermittent fasting I thought it'd be good for me Do you do it 16:8 or... -20:4 -That's tough But I'm not obsessive... You don't always keep to that schedule, right? I don't do it obsessively It's less stressful if you just think of it as eating one or two meals a day But there must've been a reason why you started intermittent fasting Since I have a jacket shoot in the US Yeah And to get ready for your comeback Right, my comeback We should talk about that -We should -Yeah Ask me anything and I'll answer the best I can -You have a single coming out -Yes, it took such a long time Tell us about the song Shouldn't we listen to it first? I haven't heard it yet since I was on tour Really? You haven't heard it yet? I wasn't in Korea for two months Oh Right Can you play the song? Yeah Can you turn up the volume? [Barbecue time during the interval♡] Oh, okay, okay, okay I'm getting a feeling already [The feeling of a hit in that short moment] It's awesome, right? Let's go, No. 1 on the Hot 100! [Billboard HOT 100 No. 1!] Jung Kook, let's go! Get a move on! I can tell just from the first verse that it'll be No. 1 on the HOT 100! Let's go! [Congratulations][Prediction realized] [As he goes from BTS member Jung Kook] [to solo artist Jung Kook] [the song that will begin his journey] [A summer song that will create a splash this summer] Do you have a choreo for this? I do Can I see it? You want me to show you now? Yes, yes, yes, dance [That'd be great] This is how it goes It's perfect for a dance challenge video This is how it goes Nice... Nice...! Wow [Feeling proud] I'm sure it'll go to No. 1 on the HOT 100 You did it! I can relax now It's a great song What are you gonna do for solo promotions? [Q. Any plans for solo promotions?] For my promotions it's not gonna be like a comeback -In that market -It'll be like a debut [Promoting like a new solo artist] it'll be like a debut You have media promotions lined up in the US and the UK? Yes I'll be starting out with Good Morning America How do you want to perform? I just want to do what I do best and be totally awesome at it What will you be performing? "Dynamite" and... "Seven," "Dynamite," "Euphoria" These three Everyone's been dying to see you -Yeah -ARMY I should get myself in shape before I go Go and slay hard [Jung Kook, go and be yourself♡] Everyone will go crazy How did you start this project? [Q. How did you start working on "Seven"?] Didn't you go to the US? Yes, I worked on it in the US [A. Started work in the US] I got the song [First of all] And I loved it -Yeah -The moment I heard it I was like "I have to do this" Totally Without the song "Seven" I might've still been on a break right now I loved being on a break [For real] For real I have a hard time when I'm on a break I was totally enjoying my time off and this song got me started again ["Seven" got him started as a solo artist] If I had heard this song I would've done it myself I'd have been like, "Let me do it I'll sing it in English" [A bold switch to a vocalist] Anyway, so that's how I started You recorded it in the States Yes And while I was there... I am proud to be a K-idol So I worked really hard on the details as I was recording Yeah I had to keep up Korea's BTS's main vocalist Jeon Jung Kook Did you set everyone straight? Uh... I don't know about that -Yeah -But anyway, I did good You recorded it really well [Never sloppy when it comes to music] [Great at his job] [Showed everyone!] -So, you have a digital single coming out -Yes What's next after the single? After the single I have another single Yeah And then, I'll be releasing a small mini album by November [Even planning an album too!] You must be busy then I am Are the songs for the album all ready then? No I have to start working on them now I think this single will be a huge, huge hit I want a song like this for my second single too but I haven't found it I could just write one for you A song by you? Can you do a good job? No [LOL] On my laptop there's every kind of song What about doing Jersey? -Jersey club? -Yeah I did want to try Jersey club I have a track for that! I really do You can do that one! Do what? Just do it Okay? Uh... Just send it to me then Just send it? I've mentioned this a lot on TV shows before but of all the vocalists I've ever met you're the most genius Yes That's what I said about you when I met other songwriters The meeting of two geniuses It's great to see you Yeah, sure And people need to know this Before he joined the agency he had never sung in his life Right And I've seen everything you've gone through ["Genius," a word that always follows Jung Kook around] Honestly, in the past hearing that was a lot of pressure and I didn't like hearing it But I had to work even harder because people were saying that Right You just have to keep going You were born with the talent You're good at singing high notes too I couldn't before What was hard for me when you practiced was that you'd always be singing every moment your eyes were open I'd be like "Can you not sing in the car?" "Can you not sing in the green room?" I got told off a lot But that's how hard you worked Everyone on our team is a super hard worker -We had to be -Yeah And it's been ten years now! Ten years! Wow What's so interesting about our team is that we each have a clear role which is great Yeah Roles that no one else can do I think that really helps us complement each other I love that about us You guys in the rap line were a big influence on us When we were trainees the vocal line would just be fooling around not listening to any songs [The four in the vocal line had a relatively easygoing time] and the rap line guys would get upset -and gather us around -With a list of songs [Gave them work♡] with a long list of songs and told us to make sure to listen to them all You did that for us [Made them listen to various genres of music] So after we debuted... Now I don't listen to them anymore I don't listen to them [Time goes by...] If I'm being honest I didn't listen back then either [The same even as time goes by...] But now you do I just play random songs [Just listens randomly...] But you could do that since you had talent Honestly, you just have talent The agency... made a very great choice But without you... [LOL] what would we have done? I'm just kidding ["I think Jung Kook is our DNA" - RM] No You once said you wanted to be good enough to perform on your own for three to four hours? Yes, during an interview The only concerts I've ever done are our team concerts and I was curious about my own abilities I was curious whether I could put on a concert all on my own You saw me in Seoul My concert [Went to SUGA's concert to cheer him on] I stayed until the very end and I noticed that the stage gradually disappeared Yeah Was that intentional? That was part of the production -Oh! -But people found that really cool Seeing the stage disappear I know! At the end, only a tiny part was left That was a great idea Solo concerts and team concerts are different because for team concerts, there's not much you can do regarding the production [There are limits to stage production for team concerts] Right For example, when we're dancing or performing -the audience has to watch like this -Yeah [The audience's attention is divided evenly among the 7 members] So there aren't a lot of sets or things we can use [More focus on the group performance rather than the stage production] But if you do it alone you can do anything you want I think it'll be fun What should I do for my concerts? Should I come up with ideas already? When the time comes I'll tell you all you need to know I prepared for a really long time for my tour Yeah I did run-throughs starting a month before -Three times a week -Seriously? I did 28 concerts for my tour Wow And I did 20 run-throughs before starting the tour -In Korea? -Yeah I did it exactly like the real thing [Practically did twice as many concerts] You worked really hard Honestly, it was scary doing it alone [Prepared close to perfection feeling the weight of being alone] It must be scary What's good about a team is that you have members supporting you [Dependable members who support you] I caught a really bad cold halfway through [SUGA caught a cold during his tour] It was so bad, I thought I might collapse on stage While during this tour? When I got back to Korea after the tour I did nothing but sleep That must've been so stressful -When I got up in the morning -Yeah you know I never get a hoarse throat -Yeah -But [Couldn't talk due to his poor condition] You couldn't talk? That's how I sounded I was with my parents and they told me to stay in my room [Stayed away from his family just in case] So I got tested but I was okay That's good [Fortunately, he was okay] I didn't have COVID But I still had to go up on stage [Although he was sick] So I did... I just had to do it Even though I was running a fever of 38 to 39 degrees [Fever kept rising] I had to play the guitar and sing but my voice was a mess [ARMY was waiting for me] That's so stressful But I still had to sing live Right The drink you had in your hand was whiskey, wasn't it? Yea, it was a highball At first, it was just whiskey on the rocks but I switched it to a highball after I caught that cold I made it into a "hyperball" -Hyperball? -Yeah Like with an energy... With an energy drink, lemon, and ginger... And things like bellflower root? I just put everything in it [Made a drink to recover his health] I was like, "If I drink this I can perform on stage!" So you were recovering while performing! I could perform on stage [As long as I can perform...!] Anyway, after I had that I got through it even though I was so sick That's the hardest part when performing alone You just have to... You don't have anyone you can lean on Yeah No one's there to take your place You can't run from it [Everything is on you] You just have to go up on stage So if you... do put on a concert I'll give you some tips since I've already done it Do you have tips for when you're sick? I do! I really do! Oh, nice We have to talk about that [While we're on the subject of solo performances] I wondered how you did it Did what? The Qatar World Cup [2022 Qatar] Oh, Qatar I was watching it live Don't you think the entire country was watching it? Prob... ably? While I was watching I said out loud... -I was watching it alone at home -Yeah "He's so cool" For real, for real I was like "Wow" We're on the same team and we perform together but as an ordinary citizen [As Min Yoongi, a Korean citizen] I felt so proud my shoulders went like this [Hehe] That's our team's youngest [That cool kid is our team's youngest] Everyone was talking about you [Jung Kook got a lot of support from the older members] Tell me about how you prepared for it Preparing for it wasn't easy... You know how it is You notice the parts that need work [Tuned up with the members over the years] There were a lot of parts that needed more work It was just different [Different from the stages and setups he was used to] So, I went five to six days before the show in Qatar and I was really glad I got there early Why? I thought I only had to do a rehearsal once I got there but I realized we had to improve some parts [Wanted to do better once he got there!] And I didn't get any choreo either Oh, really? I didn't get anything There were dancers but I didn't have any choreo [Choreo for dancers but not Jung Kook] I thought It would be so weird if I didn't dance while everyone else was so I just asked for the choreo video [Instantly copied the choreo on site] I said I'd just copy it -So you did? -Yeah And during the last chorus the choreo changes -Yeah -It becomes intense like this I asked them to change that part so they did [With Jung Kook's active input] And I redid the formations [The choreo and formations became better] That's how it went Originally, there was nothing But it was so... While I was watching I thought you just looked like a total superstar I was talking with the members and we were like "He has to be a singer until the day he dies" Of course That's what we thought I had a lot of fun [In Qatar] When I walked off stage I felt really bummed though I could've done so much better! That's all I could think about He's the type that really cries if he feels if he didn't do well on stage He gets so upset "SUGA" I can't help but think "Is this really the best I can do?" I look at myself really subjectively -Yeah -instead of objectively Because it's me I always wonder if I did well That's our strength Constantly wanting to do better is our strength but we do need to be a bit objective about our team and ourselves Since we can't always live like that [with regrets] That's what I'm trying to do these days! Thinking that way shows me what I need to work on more -Separately -That's true I have to be able to look at things objectively [Being objective] in order to see the areas I lack in [leads to improvement and positivity] and I'll be able to work on them This is where I think you've grown a lot In the past, when you were stuck on something... I couldn't get past it You'd have such a hard time [Jung Kook blamed himself in the past and had a hard time] No matter how much we told you it was okay [Even though members said it was okay] you couldn't get over it even three to four years ago [Couldn't look at himself objectively] Right -When we were on tour -But as we went on a break [However, through their break] you were able to focus on yourself Through Qatar and your new single [Seven] I can tell that you've grown a lot [Jung Kook was able to shine more] Yeah, life became more enjoyable -Right -I think it's nice We've lived with intensity I just know instinctively When you were younger [The golden maknae] you had a lot of worries [In the past] -I did -Yeah I think I feel reassured now You're doing well on your own I think it's all because I met the really good BTS members The six of us think we're lucky [Our Jung Kook♡] that we met you That's what's great about our team We fought a lot when we were younger That's how we came this far I met Jimin yesterday for drinks You did? You had drinks with Jimin He always talks about that when we meet -About the past -Yeah [Talking about memories] Our memories Right, right, right I think this was all possible because we didn't know anything back then If we had known what to do and when [If we had known from the start] I don't think we could have done this We were all just kind of fools and did what we were told -We were so raw -Yeah And we all wanted to do more And felt things were unfair so we worked that much harder Our video clips start to show up during MAMA season Yeah [Dizzy] But seriously watching them makes me cry a little -Really? -Yeah I was watching the MAMA "Mic Drop" clip [2017 MAMA "Mic Drop" performance] Yeah That one's okay What was that one? For our 10th anniversary they played the video for "No More Dream" and I almost threw the remote control "No More Dream" was pretty good I can't bring myself to watch it Your gesture You only had this one move Just one move! This is all I do "It's a lie" This is all you do [Jung Kook] Why did I do that? Come on, we had just debuted You can't expect us to perform like we do now The Jeon Jung Kook now is not the same person as the Jeon Jung Kook then If we had done well then maybe we wouldn't have worked so hard Because of that rawness back then you ended up performing at the Qatar World Cup It's so embarrassing [Embarrassing] Jimin talks about it too We've been in this industry for a long time -That's what he talks about -We have to keep at it I think we'll still be around when we're 60 It's Chapter 2 now I think we can go up to Chapter 6 Let's say each chapter is ten years When we get older, we can do an a cappella version of "No More Dream" We could do dinner shows Sounds fun How fun would that be? Ha... ARMY will be grannies too by then No, they won't be as old as grannies No I mean, we'd be like grandpas too Shouldn't we be at least 60 years old then? Wouldn't we be that old around Chapter 6? While I was on tour, I felt that our fans are growing older together with us Right And so while we continue to do music as we grow older and talk about past memories we just grow older together talking about it [With ARMY] -I did a video call fansign event -Yeah [Agust D met with ARMY through a video call fansign event] recently We can talk one on one now And you know how we couldn't do promotions during the pandemic? So ARMY told me what went on in between Oh During that period [ARMY told him what went on during the interval] For those two to three years What ARMY thought about We're not just fans and artists anymore We're more like just partners now That's just how things should be It'd be hilarious doing a video call fansign event when we're old We'd be looking at our phones like this with blurry eyes [Blurry] One ARMY said to me "I've been your fan ever since elementary school and now I've graduated from college and I'm starting a new job" -That's what she told me -That's awesome Since it's been ten years It kind of made me emotional Wow... Which university did she go to? I didn't ask [Hehe] I don't know where she went Which concert do you remember the most? At the top of my head, "Euphoria" where I was flying Oh, Chicago!? When I was half out of my mind That happens when it rains It was cold and rainy that day so everyone kind of lost it while performing Usually, after pouring out all your energy on stage you feel exhausted Right But I didn't feel that way that time because I was out of my mind I had so much fun Honestly, I want to do more of that We can't now, not right now -It's physically impossible right now -Yeah But if everyone is discharged from their military service [later] Yeah I could go crazy When Seokjin went to serve he called and said "Yoongi, I want to perform so bad" Yeah He talks about that in our group chat too We all feel the same way [All 7 of them miss the stage] It's so fun Performing on stage is just fun But... You know... I keep thinking about it even if I don't want to Wanting to perform For me, it's when you got injured [SUGA's pick] Oh He suddenly went to the restroom saying he was going to warm up -I went to the restroom... -And he came out screaming All that blood! videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA] [Time to drink with SUGA] [Brought to you by Hanwoo Board and Le Mouton] It's already been a year since SUCHWITA began [As of the recording date] [Congrats to me...] [Congrats / Soon to be SUCHWITA's 1st anniversary] I had no idea we'd go on for this long when we first started Thank you so much, everyone [♥Overwhelming thanks♥] And on top of that, we have a guest who wanted to be on the show again so he booked a table [Became a regular with just two appearances] In the heat of summer he exploded with energy [Equipped with the explosive energy of summer] and in the fall he's here to cool us down [and the coolness of fall] My buddy who's always upbeat Last time, he definitely said he had nothing more left to say but, let's meet him and hear what he has to say Name, Jung Kook Occupation, a walker who always walks with ARMY "Loved the drinks, food, and vibe! [Beef Hunter] Can't stop thinking about it If you're busy, just leave the door open I'll just hang by myself!" Jung Kook! Let's go! Always walking with ARMY I'm Jung Kook [BTS Jung Kook] ["Seven (feat. Latto)" His first solo song took the world by storm] ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" His next track was another hit] ["Standing Next to You" Solidifying his place as a global pop star] [A guest who's back BTS Jung Kook] Hey, how long did you hang out after the shoot that day? About an hour You sang that many songs? Well, since ARMY likes it when I sing... SUCHWITA got over 10 million views on a video for the first time Let's go [JK is insanely awesome][13M views] [EP 15. Have a Drink on SUCHWITA] [13M views] You kept your hair long for a while Last time, middle schooler Kookie was here [EP. 15 Middle schooler Kookie] -I see you got a haircut this time -Yeah [EP. 21 Clean-cut Kookie] But when your hair is shorter your face stands out more I should've tried to slim down more... Compared to last time, you have a bit more...! Yeah, yeah, yeah It's pretty cute I failed [Diet failed] I heard you had a lot of fun that day There must've been a reason why you wanted to be on the show again Since this is gonna be released in November my album will be almost ready by then [Album is a go!] "Seven" was actually... [Jung Kook's "Seven (feat. Latto)" received a lot of love this summer] Do you remember? Billboard? I said it would go to number one on the Billboard Hot 100 chart I think it happened because you said it would [Minstradamus's prediction was correct] When I first heard it I just knew that it would be huge [No need for words] Number one [Billboard No. 1] And the enormous numbers [Enormous streaming numbers] It's dominating the global charts now not just the Korean music shows -How do you feel? -Right I was pretty confident about it... But it's getting so much more love than I had expected... We'll talk more about it -over the drink that Jung Kook prepared -Over a drink I brought something really nice! Oh, something nice [Hi**ki 21 / A Japanese blended whisky with a rich malt whisky flavor] [Warms up hands] You must be really busy these days I'm almost done! The main game starts now But as someone who's known you for a very long time I hope you finish without exhausting yourself Just keep your mind strong Doing things on your own is really different from doing things with members by your side, emotionally -Right -It's really different I missed the guys... -Drink up and let's have a deep -A deep conversation together [Let's talk about music again today] Since your album will be out really soon I prepared a hearty meal so you can get your strength up -Bring it in, please -I'm ready [Hehe] It's beef again today [Meat] [Come on] [Hanwoo] [Come on] The Hanwoo Board prepared some hanwoo with amazing marbling just for you -Wow -It's hanwoo Wow, the rice This is a lot [Haha] Since you eat so well Last time, you even ate some of mine -Right, right, right -That's why they prepared more today [Prepared plenty of rice...♥] Wow, the grill too Got you a griddle Looks great! They said they prepared a hanwoo cake to celebrate your album A hanwoo cake? [Cracks up] Wow! [This is the hanwoo cake] -You should take this home -Yeah -Can I take it home? -Of course How many grams is this? We'll keep it in the fridge so that it doesn't go bad Wow, thank you It looks amazing L... L... L... Looks amazing -Seriously -You know? I ate really well while I was on tour [Hehe] I ate all sorts of things but hanwoo... -It's the best? -It's the best. For real [Yes!] It recharges your energy Let's take our time I love meat It's good! -Have a drink -Drink up Are you still doing intermittent fasting these days? These days... I should have [Ha...] [Haha...] Why haven't you been? It's too hard Of course it's hard As soon as my tour was over I ate like crazy and gained a ton of weight [LOL] All I kept thinking about was "I'll start dieting tomorrow" Me too. I'm gonna start again tomorrow I'm starting tomorrow but the shoot is the day after that A shoot for what? My music video [As of the date of recording Jung Kook will soon be off to shoot his MV] -Oh, your music video? -Yes The "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" music video will be out by the time this airs Yeah, your next single "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)"! "3D" will be out by then [Jung Kook's second single "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)"] but we're about to shoot the music video now What's "3D" about? It's a love song too Simply put... It's kind of like "I wanna see you in 3D" Like you wanna see more diverse sides? -Right, right, right -Something like that? It's like... The 2000s! Let's take a listen! I haven't heard it yet ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" / Jung Kook] Oh, it is! The dance too! The movements are precise! ["3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" An old-school sound from the mid-2000s] [featuring Jack Harlow] You're really good! I should be! You're the main vocalist of BTS! -Right -You should be good Last time, you asked me if I set everyone straight I did Yeah [Satisfied] It was tough -It was really tough -Why? -I had to decide on my next single -Yeah -But "Seven" got such a great response -Yeah so I wanted something that pulled you in like that But it was so hard finding the right song The funny thing is though I recorded "3D" later than the title track of my album -You recorded it last? -Yes I recorded it while I was working on the other tracks for my album After hitting 1st on the Billboard Hot 100 you wrote "Let's go higher" on Weverse Is there a higher place you can go? -Of course! -Mars? Let's go! [Haha][LOL] Last time, I talked about how I wanted to reach a level where I could be satisfied with myself -Besides, we have a lot more goals up here -Yeah We always had a lot of goals as a team too They were always up high I feel the same way going solo But it's not easy [After achieving so much] always having more goals Without my aspirations to improve myself I'm basically a dead man Didn't you used to say that about passion? It's more or less the same thing [Well...] [LOL] I nagged you about going on music shows the last time you were here So how did it feel being on music shows again? You even got to do an encore [Jung Kook came in first place on music shows during his promotions] All the other artists were up on stage with you -Honestly! -Yeah A few ARMY were there to see me [After the pre-recording] [To see the encore] So I wanted to stay as long as I could Also, I wasn't expecting to come in first Why not? All the numbers were pointing to it Come on I wasn't expecting it at all so I was thinking I should show ARMY my face as long as I could on stage before coming down, but then suddenly I came in first place -So... -Yeah, you looked so surprised It was so sudden and I was so surprised And the clip of the encore... It got so much buzz! The legendary 3:37 ♪ Monday Tues... ♪ It used to be Ji-min [LOL] His was the legendary 3:33 ARMY's legendary 3:37 I saw it too I didn't expect this at all [July 30, 2023, Encore stage after coming in first place on a music show] Source: SBS] Sing with me! [Enjoyed the encore stage with ARMY] [Handed over the mic one more time at 3:37] [JK / Who was this amazing fan at 3:37...] [JK / Our ARMY are great singers!!!] They were... just so happy! [Of course] "I hope my energy... reaches Jung Kook" That's what she probably felt During the pre-recording, the entire venue -Right, right -is filled with our fans But during the live show -There are other artists -there a lots of fans of other artists [Fans of various artists are there too] So there aren't as many of our fans In the middle of all that they wanted to cheer you on Right, right I think they wanted to build up harmony I think they wanted to sing an octave higher than you [LOL][LOL] But they couldn't go so high [Serious about teasing ARMY] -But their feelings got across -Yeah And they got across to all the viewers watching the live show and to me and all the members They got across -Right, right -They got across [ARMY is so cute, haha♥] We should talk about your overseas promotions [Jung Kook promoted overseas as well] GMA Live Lounge Your overseas promotions got a lot of attention as well Didn't it rain then? -When you were on GMA? -It seemed like it was gonna rain with thunder Apparently, you have to take shelter if there's thunder [Because of how the park is laid out] so I just suddenly had to go up in five minutes [Rehearsal was cancelled too] -Without a rehearsal? -Yeah I was told I just had to start the pre-recording I was like "Huh? What?" And I wasn't even feeling well then [So cute, haha] so I was kind of panicking But it all ended well [Despite not being in his best form his performance on GMA was a success] You did good I could've done better [Still] You always say that I'm kind of a perfectionist That's just how I am Being that way has its advantages But you've been telling me that I should learn how to let go sometimes so these days I'm trying to just accept things as they are After promoting for "3D" and your solo album watch your "Seven" performance on GMA or Live Lounge and you'll be like "Huh?" Not bad! "It wasn't that bad after all" "Hey, I was pretty good" That's what you will probably think That would be nice [Haha] Sometimes, when I hear you singing live it's like you're on autotune It just happened at some point -At some point? -Yeah I think it was during "Dynamite" Yes, that's it! -That was when I improved a lot -Yeah Like you broke through [Jung Kook grew some more?] That's what I thought -I'm making a new breakthrough again these days -Yeah -You have to keep changing -I keep changing And try new genres Right, right We're not artists that do just one genre Yeah [BTS can cover various genres] When we can do various genres... I really like being able to do that -It's our weapon, our strongest weapon -Totally I started out with rap and hip-hop but now I can do all sorts of genres When I was younger, I thought just doing one genre was really cool I thought it made you look like an expert [Mindset of an expert...] Where you have something of your own [A genre that you specialize in] But nowadays, you have to know how to do everything Diversity is important When you were younger you probably wanted to sing more than you wanted to rap but because of your experience rapping you can do these genres now -Right -So in the end, all the things we did ended up becoming our strengths Exactly I guess we could define our musical style if we tried but we did so much -We didn't stick to one genre -We didn't stick to one [No boundaries in genres] I think that really helped me It's because of your experience rapping [Self-pat] -"My name is Jung Kook" -Yeah, yeah You were already doing "Seven" since then -Yeah -This was the only gesture you did It all started here? [Chills] You had this one gesture It took ten years to reveal what it meant ["Seven" is bewildered] You're able to sing these cool pop songs because you went through that process [Became an amazing pop star] Recently you went to the US with Jimin [Jung Kook went to the US with Jimin?!] and you called me during your shoot What were you filming? [Q. What did you film in the US with Jimin?] [Here comes a spoiler] All I heard from Jimin was "Hey, I'm going to the US tomorrow!" So I asked "Why are you going to the US again?" And he said "I'm going to the US to drink with Jung Kook" [LOL] "You're going to the US to drink with Jung Kook? That's so awesome" [LOL, haha] So he went [LOL] and the next day you guys suddenly called -while you were camping -Right, right What was that about? On a shoot with Jimin ages ago he said it might be fun to do a travel variety show with me and I agreed But it didn't end up going anywhere after that Then suddenly, they set up a shoot [Funny already] It was so funny after Jimin came Why? It was just... a total mess Why? -As soon as he came... -Yeah [Spoiler...] [LOL] There's something about Jimin that tugs at your heartstrings Yeah, it was so funny and the next day we were doing something... [Second spoiler...] It was hilarious [Jimin & Jung Kook, coming soon!] You're filming a documentary now? Yes, I am It follows the process from "Seven" to my album [Wanted to leave a record of producing "GOLDEN"] How does it feel with documentary cameras following you around? It feels different from when the whole team is with you, right? Honestly... When you film with other members the cameras aren't all focused on you But I always feel kind of pressured talking in front of a camera alone [Not used to cameras only filming me] I feel like I have to do something but I don't know what to do so I feel the pressure from that But documentaries are filmed to capture that side of you Just the fact that it films the entire process gives you something to talk about ten years later Even with footage that isn't released Just having it as a record of that time It's really... You don't have to use it! But the fact that you have it [Merit of documentaries Gives you lots to talk about someday] means you have a source you can use at a later time That's why you film for so long I remember seeing you working in your studio "Do you know what it took for me to get this far?" [Jumps up] [Kitty punch!!!] [Laughter malfunction] The thing about... documentary cameras is you get the most candid shots when you're not aware that they're filming you It was nice seeing you like that Despite how busy you were you performed as a guest at SUGA aka Agust D's concert [Jung Kook performed as a guest] I asked you multiple times but you kept turning me down so why did you suddenly change your mind? Did you just really want to be on stage? Well... Honestly... I wanted to support you -so I thought being there would encourage you -Right, right, right And also, because of ARMY It had been a while since I had seen that many ARMY so I really wanted to be there The biggest reason why I wanted to be on stage with the members -was because it had been so long since we put on a concert -Yeah We've actually talked about this The feeling you get when you're up on stage and hearing the cheers... -It gives you the chills I just got them again -Yeah I just really wanted to feel that again Whether it was Jimin, you or Namjoon, the truth is... -The truth is... -Considering the overall flow -Right, right -Yeah In order for the concert setlist to flow naturally it's better not to have the members perform [Better to perform alone as it is about his personal story] -That would've been better for the quality of the concert -Right but, it was a standing concert -That energy -Yeah I'm sure the reason you went on tour was because you wanted to, of course But you also told me that the main reason was because of all the ARMY who wanted to see our concert and how happy they would be It's true that they really miss seeing us and if I hadn't gone on tour this year the break between tours would've been too long When I was listening to you talk about it I was like... You really think a lot about our fans I did video fansign events and mini fan meetings for the first time in a while I'm going to do them too! Yeah, and it was a lot more fun than I expected I think it'll be fun When I meet people, they always give me messages of support There's not a lot of time to talk so in that short amount of time they tell me they're rooting for me and that they're so happy to see me That's such a big energy boost It's not something you do just out of obligation -You get more from it? -Yeah You get a lot of energy So this time... [Startled] For me, the energy... Hey, Taehyung [Taehyung dropped in] What are you doing here? Huh? Taehyung is here Oh, it's Taehyung We're in the middle of a shoot Could you please leave? [Haha] Don't you start promotions next week? [Excuse me] Yes Why aren't you grilling any meat? We were talking about something serious -Our music -It's too serious right now How did you know that we were filming? From the group chat I was working out when I heard Jung Kook [Just finished working out when he smelled hanwoo!] was filming SUCHWITA now [Even the staff didn't know he was coming] Are you doing a good job? [My little bro♥] I should always do a good job -Mind if I sit? -Sure, go ahead [Joins in naturally] Should I get some makeup done too? [Totally no makeup] No, you're good-looking anyway Jung Kook is the star today but here I am [Dropped in to support the youngest and have dinner] [So nice] -Taehyung, you want a drink too? -No thanks -You have to work out? -I was working out You're supposed to have a drink after working out [Abstaining from alcohol because the shoot was a week before his comeback!] [Really came to eat] [Hanwoo is protein] [Nom, nom] Since Taehyung can't drink I'll get you some zero cola [For V who's not drinking] -You have some? -Yeah [We have zero cola] You have everything Do you have ssamjang too? I'm not sure if we have that -So natural -Yeah [So natural like he's at home] He came in like someone who was waiting to eat They told me you guys were talking about music so I was just gonna watch for a bit then leave [Watching][Should I...][go now...] But then, you gave me some attention Okay, let's bring up the view count! -Let's go! Aim for 20 million! -Let's go! [SUCHWITA, let's go higher!] Wait, hang on! After my first show that day you went on Weverse Live [Said he wanted to be on stage again after the concert they did together] and talked for nearly two hours didn't you? [On live] Ah, I'm so bummed out I wish I could turn back time Yoongi, I'm sorry [Pat♥] Sorry, Yoongi Can I go again tomorrow? I don't mind going just for that [SUGA / No] I don't have to sing "Seven" [SUGA / Not tomorrow] [Feeling more bummed since he practiced in between his overseas promotions...] I couldn't get it out of my mind! But you did great! I'm the one who got overexcited and my voice cracked once No, no, no Your voice cracking is okay But for me, it was your concert! And I felt like I kind of spoiled it If I ever get to perform at your concert -Yeah -I'm gonna wreak havoc You do that [Please] Also, the real reason I went to your concert was because -you said you missed us -Yeah Since I'm on my own -honestly, it's kind of scary -Yeah, I think it would be [Last time on SUCHWITA] What's good about a team is that you can depend on the members beside you [Remembered SUGA saying he missed the members] Even if you don't do anything if the members are with you... I just wanted you to feel that again -because that's how I felt -Yeah The member I respect the most lately is Yoongi [Person he respects: Min Yoongi] I do too! Jimin came the next day and so did Namjoon They all talked about how nervous they felt I was so nervous too! Because it had been a while since they had been on stage I heard Namjoon's hands were shaking like this [Shake, shake] Yeah, so he held the mic with both hands [Leader's hands trembled as he held the mic] It really took me back a lot [Seeing that] Even when we performed in front of 50,000 or 60,000 people we used to be like "Let's just do it!" "Let's go, let's go!" and we'd just go up on stage [Used to perform captivating the audience] But then, there was about a year's break [Seeing them feel nervous to perform after a while] Seeing that I felt really grateful but also a little sad It kind of ached a little [Felt a little heartache] I loved performing that song with you! ♪ Burn it, burn it facing you in the deepest of places ♪ [When performing "Burn It (feat. MAX)"] -Looking at you -Where we were circling! I loved that [Spontaneous movement that wasn't planned] -We didn't plan any of that -Yeah, we didn't It just came out from our ten years of experience It just fell into place on stage? Yeah, but I really loved that part ♪ Burn it, burn it ♪ [Sending signal] ♪ Burn it, burn it facing you in the deepest of places ♪ [Signal received] ♪ Embarrassment, hatred, disgust and even rage ♪ [Grins] ♪ How futile all that is ♪ ♪ Maybe those are only mirages ♪ I had so much fun I can tell what you wanna do just by looking at you Just seeing the look in your eyes so we circled [Ten years, the time it takes to know the look in each other's eyes] You had good teamwork I felt so happy in that moment We were always like that even when we performed as a team I keep thinking about how fun it'll be when we're back together again and perform When we do [Grin] we'll devour the whole world! I can't wait for that moment, seriously [Older member grills the meat as always] [while the younger members eat...] [Like waiting for a familiar dinner] [Cheers] [Me too] [Cheers] We should talk a bit about your album It's called "GOLDEN" It's finally out Yeah In that photo I see you're wearing a jacket [Album cover] Jung Kook likes to raise his chin up! For "Seven" too It's because I don't look as good when I look at the camera like this So I need to lift it up a little [Lift] You look too much like a baby if you go like this I don't look that great if I do this [15-year-old Kookie] I see a bit of 15-year-old Kookie You look like a baby because you go like this [Head↓ Eyes↑] No, no, anyway the word "GOLDEN" [Satisfied] has come to be associated with me a lot Starting with Namjoon calling me "Golden Maknae" What do you want to show everyone through this album? I can rap, sing, and dance You're an all-rounder? I wouldn't say that Then, you're the Golden Maknae? -Am I? -Yeah, I keep telling you to go with that I'm the one who gave him the nickname "Golden Maknae," but he doesn't use it [It was a little embarrassing at first] Why won't you use such a great name? Hello, I'm BTS's Golden Maknae Jeon Jung Kook [Now, it's my favorite nickname] I think this period in my life is the golden time for me You'll have more times that are golden I'm just saying "Seven" did so great so I don't want to miss out on this golden period in my life That's what I wanted to capture in my album [A resolution to keep this golden period going] In my opinion, two or three more times like this will come I have to work for that -I think there will be at least five -I have to work harder for that to happen Also, as soon as I saw that cover I thought -"He's a true pop star"! -Yes! We finally have an Asian pop star [Oho!] -What's with that face? -Asian pop star [For the fans] Your title track is "Standing Next to You" It's your solo album's title track [Title track "Standing Next to You"] I recorded this with Andrew [Worked with Producer Andrew Watt] I recorded "Standing Next to You" the day after I recorded "Seven" After I was done recording "Seven"... Oh, so you already had the title track by then It wasn't the title track then It was just one of the songs on the list Yeah, just one of the songs that could be the title track Oh... I don't think I should talk about this It's okay It'll be edited out anyway Why talk about something that'll be edited out? [Oh...] If you're gonna argue can you take it outside? After I was done recording "Seven" I was listening to it and I was thinking it turned out good when Andrew came over and asked me if I wanted to listen to a few songs he had worked on [Andrew played him his songs] So he played one or two and one of them was "Standing Next to You" I told him I liked it and that I'd practice it by morning so that we could record it the next day [Practiced that evening and recorded it the next day] That's how it happened and how I recorded it [Our youngest, wow!] Let's listen to "Standing Next to You" [Title track of "GOLDEN" "Standing Next to You"] The song is really awesome [Shining through the retro punk] [is Jung Kook's groovy voice] Ah~ The sound? You did it again! [I agree] The song is really nice I heard three songs in total including "Seven" and I think you chose the songs really smartly -Right -I think you found your own style [A direction that makes the best of Jung Kook's strengths] It'd be so cool with a band! If I do a showcase or a concert I'd start off with a bang with this! [Wow!] Recording it was really tough It took me about four hours By the time it was over [Spaced out] I think the only person in Korea who can pull off pop this well is you Who'd think this song was sung by a Korean? I really should study English more My English is terrible [Mouth cave opens] It's bass and drums at the end [Bass and Drum] [Jung Kook in his most perfect form "Standing Next to You"] [Nice!] -So cool -No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 and 200 -at the same time Jung Kook, congrats -So awesome [Congrats in advance] I'll try to do my best once more Congratulations -Let's go -Let's go Let's go [Let's go higher] -Originally, it was a mini album -Right -EP -It was supposed to be an EP [Original plan was to release a mini album last summer] -With about five or six tracks -Yeah But it suddenly turned into an album with how many tracks? It suddenly became 11 tracks Yeah Huh? -It... It just happened -All of a sudden? Yeah At first, I just wanted to release a mini album with a few tracks that I really loved -You know I prefer getting songs -Yeah So I'd listen, and put the ones I liked on my tracklist and then I got "3D" So your favorite track became a single -Right, right -That's how it went So after I got the songs -I recorded them all at once -Yeah And it turned out to be 11 I only heard about your recording process this time around but I felt that you had upgraded to another level because you've gotten so much faster Yeah You've become so much faster I was really surprised [News of the youngest's recording speed traveled across the ocean] I recorded five songs in a week Yeah That means your voice was able to handle it Basically, I recorded one song a day Did you do three recording sessions a day? [1 session = 3.5 hours] -Did you record for nine hours a day? Eight? -Wow No, three hours a day Three hours? If you recorded one song per session... That means you've achieved unbelievable growth Yeah... That speed... It's unfathomable for those of you who don't know, it's insanely fast [Wink!] To give you some perspective... I record one song for three days It takes me three days [Confident][Confident] It's not a matter of how capable you are It's more a matter of style [Type that works fast] [Type that works meticulously] At his speed, he's probably singing through verse one then tweaking a few things here and there then moving on to verse two and tweaking a few things there too [Sings verse 2 then goes over the whole song] -That would amount to three hours -Right, right So I'd finish up recording in one day The next day, we'd retouch it Then the next day I'd record the next song So I recorded for five days straight -Your album has 11 tracks -Yes, 11 tracks When you were choosing the 11 tracks what was most important to you? Why did it have to be those tracks? -The key theme -There must've been key points [Assistant MC] was the most universal emotion of all Love So all the songs in my album are about love They're all about love There's a context to it too [Listed the songs according to overall context] I'll just tell you about them in order "3D (feat. Jack Harlow)" "Closer to You (feat. Major Lazer)" "Seven (feat. Latto) - Explicit Ver." "Standing Next to You" Then it's "Yes or No" And "Please Don't Change (feat. DJ Snake)" -"Please Don't Change" -Yes Those songs are all about when you are in love so they're all uptempo Then from track seven, "Hate You" it's about breakups You suddenly fell out of love It goes from being upbeat [From the moment of falling in love to the breakup] to a more sentimental vibe [A collection of various emotions about love] When you're producing an album... Can I get some ice? You can't help but be really conscious about the number of tracks and the genre Yeah Because albums, mini albums and singles are all different in nature Right, right, right Releasing an album means that [SUGA's glass is empty] you're... Oh, thank you -You're ready to go on tour -Yeah [Releasing an album means you're ready to tour] And when you're coming up with a setlist it means you can add the songs you want to Artists who have released at least two albums [Here's some ice] then start releasing mini albums [Thanks!] Because then, you can just change up a few songs on the setlist -Swap out a few -Like changing up the order Couldn't he put on concerts with the number of songs he has now? He could! With the number of songs he has... Instead of a concert I'm doing a showcase I think I'll wrap things up with one showcase [Will be putting on a showcase for ARMY this time] Then you'll be doing about 12 to 13 songs? Yeah, practically the entire album -Where are you holding the showcase? -At Jangchung Arena [November 20th, Jangchung Arena] I hope as many ARMY as possible can be there Yeah, since I'm doing the showcase for ARMY I'll do my absolute best so that they can have the best time possible [Not enough words to express how proud we are of our youngest's growth] So this album... You've released singles or previously unreleased songs before but this is basically your first album [First solo album] Yes, it's my first How does it feel releasing your first album? [Q. How does it feel releasing your first solo album?] I did hear you were feeling some pressure I do feel that I could've done better In the recording? Just overall... Because I really did the best I could but if I had done my best just a little sooner -No -I wonder how it would've been You know I've released a lot of albums but just because you've prepared for it for a long time -Doesn't mean it turns out well? -that doesn't mean it turns out well So when it's time to start you just have to let go and move on You won't know the result until time passes I haven't experienced it for myself yet so even when you tell me things like that I don't entirely get it but I still try to move on from those feelings of not having done enough Now that I'm releasing an album I kind of feel excited This is when you have the most fun Yeah, and the genres are so diverse ["GOLDEN" has diverse genres] I wonder which song people will like the most and I also changed my voice tone a little while recording each song I noticed in "Standing Next to You" your voice sounded really solid Right, right There are songs like that but in "Hate You" I sound really sad I'm really breathy You can hear all that [Even recorded his breath full of emotion] I wonder what people will like the most and I want to be recognized for my work too but I wonder if I will be [An album that captures diverse emotions] [What did you think of "GOLDEN"?] You're the last one to release a solo album [Last one in BTS to release a solo album] -Right -Why don't you say a word toward the camera for ARMY who are waiting for 2025? [A word for ARMY] Actually, I'm a little mad at myself [Why?] I was able to record my album really quickly but after our group promotions were over I feel like I took it too easy I didn't forget you but I do want to say I'm sorry about that That's why I worked really hard on this album and since they're songs about love I hope you'll be able to gain a lot of comfort from them And I'd like to show you more awesome sides of me so that you can be proud of me Honestly my first tattoo was of you guys It was you, and I'd like to be by your side all the way to the end Let's be happy! Since Taehyung suddenly dropped in too why don't you say a word to ARMY who are waiting for 2025? [Me...?] [You're the best!] You didn't say anything Jung Kook already said the cool stuff I just... We've already made so many memories with ARMY over the years but I'd like to make more in 2025 So if you can just wait for us a little longer... We'll come back more awesome than ever This is not fair [We are so thankful and happy that you are by our side] [Let's always be happy for years to come by SUGA] Thanks for dinner! Jung Kook, our first guest who volunteered to be on the show again Stay until the closing! I enjoyed the meal [Got plenty of protein] It was great protein The two of us will wrap up then You just came to eat protein? Make the ending cool [To. V Thank you for coming as a surprise guest] -See you -I'll be back on SUCHWITA! Jung Kook, our first guest who volunteered to be on the show again Yes! And Taehyung, our other guest who suddenly dropped in after working out was here too How was it today? I loved our conversation today As I mentioned before out of all the members I respect [Person he respects, Min Yoongi] you're at the top these days [Embarrassed] I just wanted to talk to you about my music one more time so that's why I came on the show today [A precious conversation with SUGA] We can always talk comfortably and meet up anytime I was really happy today When you were here to talk about your single last time there was only one song to talk about music-wise -so it was a little hard -Yeah -That's why we sang and stuff -Right, right But now that you've released an album with 11 tracks... How long has it been since you were last here? Only about three or four months, right? -Three months -Three or four months [Three months exactly based on the recording date] But in that time, it feels like you've gone up another level No, another two levels [Youngest returned after more growth] We've been talking about it [Hehe♥] and it feels like you have a lot more of your own babies now [Musically] Yeah, and you knew that I wanted to hear what you had to say when it all came together I can't wait to see how much more of an awesome artist you'll become [Huh?] -♪ Happy birthday to you ♪ -Huh? Was it yesterday? -Two days ago? Is today the 3rd? -Two days ago -Two days ago, right? -It's the 3rd -♪ Happy belated birthday ♪ -Hey -Belated thanks -♪ Happy birthday dear Jung Kook ♪ ♪ Happy birthday to you ♪ [Makes a wish!] Okay What's that? This is your birthday present [Birthday present for our Jung Kook] -A birthday present? What is it? -Sneakers, your favorite -Size 280 -There are three? One's for you Thanks for the gift What is it? For Jung Kook's birthday [One for Taehyung] Sneakers, so that you'll fly even higher Let's go Le Mouton, an eco-friendly shoe brand -Le Mouton -Le Mouton We got it by express delivery because Taehyung suddenly dropped in -Thank you -We got it by express delivery [Thank you advertiser♥] Wear these and run far -Yes -Keep going forward [Hoping he keeps going forward] -You should fly high -Yes Le Mouton This is the "Mate" line -They look really comfy -BTS's soul-mate -It's eco-friendly which is really important these days -Eco-friendly [Plus, it's eco-friendly] They'd be nice to wear on most days or when I work out If you check out the cushioning it's really comfy So, when we practice... [This is nice] This is nice After the shoot I have a fitting, then practice I should wear these Wear them whenever Le Mouton Le Mouton, Le Mouton [Going home for real] -Thank you -Enjoy them And happy birthday Thanks [Nom] I wished you a happy birthday in our group chat too but you seem so busy these days You barely have time to sleep [Felt concerned about the youngest who has been spending a hectic time] That reminds me Your text in our group chat was the most moving of all! "Jung Kook, I hope you have the happiest day today" I always say things like that on your birthday I kind of see it now [How you feel] -You see it now that you're older, right? -Yeah, I do, I do I mean, it's not like it's the first time I'm feeling these emotions but I think they've become more clear I just want our team BTS to be together for as long as we can In the way ARMY wants... Staying true to ourselves I hope we don't forget that Recently, I've been thinking more about the team Yeah Things aren't unilateral when you're on a team There's a central point and everyone stands around it -And we look toward it together -Right, right [A team looks toward the same direction] Someone doesn't go ahead and say things aren't a certain way [No one is in the front leading] We have to look at things together and resolve things together That's what I've been feeling recently [That's what a team is] I just keep thinking more and more about the team If we want to explode with energy in 2025... Yeah, I feel the same way People will be waiting for us Let's be happy -Yeah, now sign your autograph... -Let's try not to get injured... Smile and be happy And bring in the year 2025 [Let's meet again smiling happily] -Bangtan, Bangtan -Bangtan ♪ Happy birthday to BTS ♪ BTS Si-hyuk! We came in first place! [There have been lots of changes but we haven't changed] [For our second "Most Beautiful Moment in Life"] "To. SUCHWITA [Signing his autograph] Let's be happy" [To. SUCHWITA BTS JK Let's be happy] -Anyway -I had a great time today Don't forget to take the sneakers They're from me. Take them home [Pat...] Le Mouton -Great job, everyone -Great job, everyone [Rooting for our Golden Maknae's GOLDEN TIME that will last forever] Thanks for the cake But you know... Jung Kook is the star today I'll be back on SUCHWITA at another time -You'll be back too? You have more to say? -You'll be back? Your episode hasn't even aired yet Well... Does there have to be something new to be on the show? Yes, there has to be something new -Really? -Yeah Yeah, there has to be something new If you want to be on the show just to drink with me wouldn't it just be better to meet up in private? videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA (Time to drink with SUGA)] [This video is sponsored by ROUND AROUND] [Autumn rain] [Autumn rain and] [Autumn rain and fragrance] There's an amazing fragrance in the studio That great fragrance is [(feat. ROUND AROUND)] Matcha [A clean autumn matcha scent just like today's guest] The vibe today is warm and fuzzy I'll invite our guest who's perfect for today's vibe [(Getting his pumps in)] Today's conversation is set to be very comfortable more than ever Name: V Occupation: the most handsome and most beautiful face in the world Number 1 male idol perfect for a coffee commercial The Gui***ss Book of World Records holder of the fastest social media following in the world It's doesn't matter if you're a rock or an old man I'm here to meet SUGA whom I'll put in my pocket Taehyung! Hehe Why are you so nervous Taehyung? Hello Take a seat [(V)] [The combination of all the charming words in the world] [BTS V] Nice to see you I heard rumors that you got really nervous about appearing on "SUCHWITA" Yeah, I got really nervous I heard you watched every episode of our members! How do you feel about being here? [Thoughts on appearing on SUCHWITA] Ha... Yes Isn't it your first time as a solo guest on a talk show? Yeah... I was getting my hair and makeup done when I received the news that he's so nervous for this [I'm nervous] Yeah... How were the other members' episodes? Because I love our members I saw all of their episodes but now that it's my turn the thought of me doing that(?) as well... Made me really nervous! And I felt the pressure [(So cute♡)] What do you mean by pressure? You just have to talk casually But I saw that each member had their own style Yeah, each guest is different Because each member had their own style [(Pressure 1230 percent)] Would just drinking with SUGA be enough? It's totally enough! -Oh, really? -Yeah So I brought some alcohol What did you bring? At first... I bet it's wine Yeah, it's wine... It's alcohol [Wine that V drinks often] that I drink all the time [Ru**ian Jack] Oh, this is the wine that I talked about when Shin Dong-yup came on the show [The wine SUGA recommended Dong-yup] I had it for the first time at your house and it was really good [Ru**ian Jack - A New Zealand white wine with tropical fruit flavor and fresh herb aroma] so I always have some at my house [Wine he had for the first time at V's house] I have about 50 bottles of this at my house Taehyung used to not drink alcohol at all I never drank So I did that What? Fruit soju was how I got started That's right When fruit soju was popular [(Grapefruit soju)] Whoa! [A special move as soon as it's brought out] How did you do that? [V tries to drink it with style but spills everything...] But he couldn't get the hype going until the end I thought I could drink it so fruit soju was how I started drinking [Started with sweet fruit soju] But people laughed at me so much! -We didn't laugh at you! -And they looked down on me...! -We didn't laugh at you! -They looked down on me -We didn't laugh at you! -"You call that alcohol?" So I wanted to drink something that people would approve of [To get the approval of the older members] -So I started drinking wine -Then let's have a glass of wine [V started drinking wine] and talk [Cheers] We prepared jamón and melon because you like them [Today's menu - Jamón and gambas that V likes] Our staff were so touched after doing the pre-interview You're the only member who sincerely answered every question Oh, really? [Thank you] They usually don't answer much! -They're like, "Let's just do it!" -I usually would do that [The members know so much about each other that they don't need to do a pre-interview] but since it's a talk show! It's different depending on whether it's being filmed or not [Pressure because it's not a private setting] As you know, it'll get edited anyway You can say all the weird things It's been tough Once this episode of SUCHWITA gets released Taehyung's solo album -That's right -will have been released to the world [V's solo album was released on Sept. 8th] It's finally out! -Yeah, finally -I remember clearly that you started working on this album around 2-3 years ago -That's right -"SUGA, I'm gonna release an album" -Yeah -"My album's getting released soon" "I'm working on it" are all things I heard 2-3 years ago [While the solo project was in the making for a long time] I think it's been 3 years [Since he's worked on the songs] -The songs you let me listen to in the beginning -Yeah, I did are they all in the album? [(Nope)] I always wrote the lyrics in gibberish and the melodies too... But I couldn't complete the songs so I got so stressed from that so I decided to receive songs So I received a song that I fell in love with The title of the album is "Layover" Yeah [Layover - A short transfer after staying within 24 hours at a stopover] I gathered all the tracks that fit -the title "Layover" the best -The producer of this album [Made up of sentimental songs] -is Min Hee-jin (ADOR), right? -That's right The vibe was so much better than I had expected It was a first for me! Yeah, because we don't get the chance -to work with outside producers often -Yeah ["Layover" is a different output made through a different process] This album is the last solo album to be put out by the BTS members That's right You're the last one -I'm feeling so much pressure -Yeah! Everyone was like, "I don't want to be last" But if I didn't like it, I wouldn't have released it Yeah! I would've said "I'm sorry, but I can't" but I really do like it [The songs of "Layover" passed V's high standards] If you see each members' albums and their promotions, you can see their individual styles I'm sure the album consists of songs that you really like That's right! The title track is "Slow Dancing" Yes Please tell us about the song I want to play it for you more than introduce it Oh, that's why you posted on social media... -It said, "Dancing (Slow)" -Oh, that's... -Was it a spoiler? It was, right? -It was... [No way] It was a spoiler I was working out and since Namjoon writes his workout sets in a such a cool way I wrote down "Dancing" [To look cool] But then I was like, "Slow Dancing"? So I put "Slow" in parentheses [Added a cute spoiler] Let's listen to it then! Okay I think I'll know when I hear it [A 70s soul sound that goes perfectly with wine] [With V's signature unique voice] ["Slow Dancing" brings up images of dancing slow just like the title suggests] -You made it into a style people can comfortably listen to -Yeah Is the whole album this vibe? Yeah! But I would like to go to 2025 [2025] Yeah, I agree -By then, we'll all be together -Yeah [2025] I wonder what we'll be like too [We miss BTS] We all have an idea of what -things will be like when we come back -Yeah What do you think it'll be like in 2025? [What does Jimin think 2025 will be like?] We'd all be back together when we're done Honestly, I have no idea what we'll talk about or where we'll even begin I'm curious about that so that's why I want to go to that time -Soon? -Yes I'm really excited about 2025 because by then, we'd all have released singles or albums [Members will have grown through solo activities] So, if we could create an album where we could talk about ourselves more all together -It'll be fun -Just us -I'd write the beats -Yeah I'd write the melody -Write lyrics -Yeah Like you said solo activities don't mean much -It's only meaningful when we're together -Yeah, the team comes first That's why I'm doing this now [Going solo for the team] While preparing for my solo album I learned how comfy and warm I've had it and how much I need to improve I realized the areas I lacked in and worked really hard [Really felt the importance of the team and my own shortcomings] But actually, I think it's okay for me to be comfier I just like being together The comfier and warmer it is for you the colder it is for me Seriously So cold The warmer you are the colder I am Yeah I work so hard [Writing songs even today to keep the young members warm] -It's not easy -I know that [Writing songs even today to keep the young members warm] I think you got the wrong end of the stick But I... [Cheers!] But I feel warm too when we perform Thanks for that Because the good performers [World's best performers] -are out in the front -Yeah It feels so warm like a jade mat [Burnt] Yeah Having guys better than me perform in the front means that I absolutely trust the team [Belief in the team] Yeah I think our team is really good at that We each have our own thing and respect what the others do [Respects each other's areas of expertise] Of course. We need that We don't invade each other's space So, I really hope you wrap things up well [Hope you wrap up promotions for "FACE" really well] No matter how hard you work you can't always work hard constantly for 10 years Sometimes I worked a little harder and sometimes a little less [The amount of hard work wasn't always the same] but while working on my solo album I clearly saw areas where I was lacking and I'm trying to bring up the level of hard work again [Bringing up the level of hard work again] I just really want to do a good job You always do a good job I know what you mean but If I'm being really objective [From an objective viewpoint not the members'] I just want to grow more [I want to grow into a singer who can make an impact] and hear people say that I'm someone who can make an impact I never thought you weren't good enough Thanks [A genius of hard work] [created through an immense about of effort] [My familiar story, FACE] A while ago, you went to visit Jin [j-hope & Jimin recently visited Jin] -I couldn't go because of a prior engagement -I know How is he? Is he doing okay? He's 66kg Jin Isn't that the most he's weighed in his entire life? -Yeah, he never went over 63kg before -Right He's getting healthier We even ate together I had jjajangmyeon and he said he was craving mulhwe [Mulhwe for Jin] He kept talking about mulhwe in our group chat That's all he talked about But also, the week before... He had mulhwe again? One of our staff went to visit and bought it for him [Already had mulhwe with staff] But he wanted to have mulhwe again and called me Is he being haunted by a ghost because he couldn't eat mulhwe? [Mulhwe ghost] Why does he like it so much? He always said he wanted mulhwe even when we went to TV stations He misses us so much [Looking for a photo of Jin] But why does this keep... [Ring-♬] [Isn't this song...?] [Chu! I'm sorry for being cute♡] [I'm sorry...] [For being cute...] Things are hilarious when I'm with the members We all look nuts [Beautiful friends] when we're together I laughed so much my throat is hoarse I wanted to talk about that because even though you were so busy -you went to Lollapalooza to show support -Yeah [Showed support for j-hope at Lollapalooza] You always go to support the members [Goes anywhere to show support for members] Yeah What does the team BTS mean for you? [Q. What does BTS mean for Jimin?] There are no words to describe it BTS is family now Family of different blood Actually... -Want another drink? -Just one more I had an interview today and they asked if my thoughts about the members had changed in any way [Have thoughts about the members changed?] That's what they asked Whether my thoughts have changed or not [Changed or not] I never thought of the members in that way It's kind of like that question "What do your fans mean to you?"] ["What does ARMY mean to you?"] "What does your dad mean to you?" He's just my dad [Dad is just dad] Exactly -Members are just members -Dad is just dad It's weird trying to explain it [No explanation is needed] Yeah [Members are my family] SUCHWITA's same question for everyone -I know what it is -Time for the last drink Instead of as Jimin of BTS does the person Park Jimin have dreams? [Q. What is the dream of Park Jimin, the person?] If I'm being perfectly honest if that division is made, then I don't think I do I don't think I have separate dreams [Park Jimin the person and Park Jimin of BTS] -as a person and a singer -Yeah So, making that differentiation and asking that question is kind of meaningless Oh, I asked a meaningless question? -That's not what I meant -Got it Let's wrap up SUCHWITA now What is wrong with him? I can't act like this with other guests Yeah, I saw I'm really polite [A polite person] I know, when Lee Sung-min was here you could hardly eat [Practically starved] So, what I want to say is I don't have a separate dream My only dream is to make this team last a long time [Only dream is to be part of BTS for a long time] Until what age? Until I can barely move Personally, even when we're old I think it'd be nice if the seven of us were sitting around with our fans sitting too [ARMY is sitting too] Just talking and singing [Just hang out and sing] Wouldn't we be over 80 then? With everyone sitting... But you still have to swear and rap At 80? What would my grandkids think of me? [Grandpa Daechwita is swearing!] [The trainee who was the last to join] [The trainee who was always last to go home] [Jimin gained six family members] [Worked hard for 10 years with his family] [Even if I have to be on my own for a while] [I know that in the end I have a family who loves me] Since your first solo album is coming out I got a present for you [Prepared a present] A present From L'OCCITANE [L'OCCITANE gift set] I've heard of it It's a home mist and pillow mist [Relaxing pillow mist & purifying home mist] It's a mist to spray on your pillow Oh, really? And a fragrance for your home Can I open it now? -Smell it -I'm so curious Is this the one for pillows? -This one is pillow mist -The pillow mist -is for spraying on your pillow -Okay -And the home mist is for rooms -It's nice! It's nice L'OCCITANE fragrances are the best [Whiff] It's a forest scent [A home mist that smells like the forest] You know what I mean? Oh, yeah It really smells like trees [IN THE SOOP as soon as it's sprayed] The pillow mist -I really like it -is lavender [Pillow mist smells like lavender] You have a hard time sleeping during promotions Spray the pillow mist and you'll smell lavender [Try it] What? What's so funny? [LOL] It's relaxing That's what lavender does I really appreciate it but the way you're kindly explaining everything -feels so weird -Give it to me. Give it -You're gonna take it for yourself -I won't L'OCCITANE [Fragrances are L'OCCITANE] [2nd oldest member's product placement to keep the younger members warm] Pillow mist and... I knew it [Deeply moved] Room spray [Signing his autograph] "To SUCHWITA, I had a great time" Are you ready? -Let's do this -Let's do this We look like grandpas We look like grandpas Let's stop We look too old I can't do this Why do people do this? I seem like an old man that wants to do TikTok Why is this trending? -I don't know -I don't get it Anyway, Jimin I hope "FACE" is a huge hit [To. Jimin I hope there is always a smile on your face while promoting "FACE"] Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo
