videos.transcript: [SUCHWITA] [Time to drink with SUGA] [This content is brought to you by Hanyang Hwaro] It's been a while but we're back with SUCHWITA I had my last concert in Seoul two days ago and came to record SUCHWITA right away [Host came straight to SUCHWITA after his Seoul concert] It feels like I'm back home after a long time [Congrats] Our guest today is a really, really, really energetic guy so I'm excited Name, Jeon Jung Kook Occupation, BTS's golden maknae and will still be even at the age of 60 "I've been constantly saying that I wanted to be on SUCHWITA but seriously... It took five months for Yoongi to finally invite me I'm so upset!" [JK / Yoongi won't give me an answer I'm so upset!] Jung Kook Come on in It's great to see you [BTS Jung Kook] [BTS's golden maknae] [A talented guy who makes the members laugh] [and an irreplaceable genius vocalist] [He's back with his solo single "Seven (feat. Latto)"] [BTS Jung Kook] You changed the lyrics to "Daechwita" while streaming live [Fan who changed the lyrics of "Daechwita" for SUCHWITA♡] and generated a lot of buzz for SUCHWITA Why'd it take so long to invite me? That's why I specially prepared a karaoke machine for you [A karaoke machine just for Jung Kook] I don't know if I'll sing though -Maybe I will after a few drinks -Yeah [He did] [Super energetically] You need to sing in places like this to get a lot of views [Got it] Got it? [Flashes a V here too] There are more cameras than I expected! It's been a while since you've been on a variety show Yeah It's hard to get used to, right? You mentioned SUCHWITA a lot though and you even reviewed Jimin's episode live on Weverse Yeah And after seeing us do the "sorry for being cute challenge" you made a face saying "What is wrong with Yoongi?" Yeah [Hey, this song...?] [Chu! Sorry for being cute♡] [Sorry...] [for being cute...] SUGA! Hello [I'm watching] Wow, it's been so long I think I'd just hang up I can't watch [Jung Kook really stopped watching] Yoongi, what is wrong with you? What were you thinking? Uh, anyway That was then [Quickly changes the subject] I invited you because you wanted me to You said you had a really nice drink -Yeah -So, did you bring it? It's something I drink often -Highball -Highball [Highball / A cocktail made with a spirit mixed with a carbonated beverage or water with ice] I like highballs Are you good at making them? I just make them to my liking Even when doing live... [Springs up] Why do you keep doing that? To prevent muscle loss The last time we had drinks with just the two of us was that time at my place Yeah, at your place We had wine Yeah, it's been so long [Their very own wine meetup] That was when I wrote "People Pt.2" Oh -That day -It was that day! We just suddenly started writing a song while drinking [Jung Kook sang for the guide demo of "People Pt.2"] It's been a while since just the two of us had drinks [Their first time since that day!] I never expected to be drinking here Should we have a drink first? [SUGA & Jung Kook's highball recipe] [1. Add ice to the glass to chill it] [2. Add a shot of whisky of your liking] [A little more for Jung Kook...] [3. Fill up the glass with carbonated water] [4. Squeeze a slice of lemon and add it as garnish] [5. Stir to mix] [The glass of highball is ready to drink] The two of us drinking was on TV once When we were in Malta -Right -Friendship is drinking Irish slammers -Irish slammers -Yeah [A clean] [chug] [Another chug] Friendship is what? Drinking Irish slammers Then today, let's say friendship is drinking highballs Friendship is drinking highballs Since you said we'd be drinking highballs today I prepared beef This is from Hanyang Hwaro [Hanyang Hwaro] [Outside skirt] [Chuck tail flap] [Wow] Looks amazing They're a super popular place right now Dong-seok is the model for their ads [Dong-seok just happens to be the model♡] They use charcoal grills Their restaurants use charcoal grills but we can't here since its indoors [Charcoal grills at their restaurants] Looks good Is it tastier with a charcoal grill? A lot tastier! You wanna grill it since you like meat? [Knows how to eat] Mmm -The marbling is nice! -Yeah [An electric grill instead of a charcoal grill on SUCHWITA!] Oh, yeah Looks so good Yum, it's good -It's good? -Yeah I heard you're doing intermittent fasting these days? Yes, apparently it's good for your health I was looking up info on diets [※Consult a relevant specialist first※] and learned everything there is to know about intermittent fasting I thought it'd be good for me Do you do it 16:8 or... -20:4 -That's tough But I'm not obsessive... You don't always keep to that schedule, right? I don't do it obsessively It's less stressful if you just think of it as eating one or two meals a day But there must've been a reason why you started intermittent fasting Since I have a jacket shoot in the US Yeah And to get ready for your comeback Right, my comeback We should talk about that -We should -Yeah Ask me anything and I'll answer the best I can -You have a single coming out -Yes, it took such a long time Tell us about the song Shouldn't we listen to it first? I haven't heard it yet since I was on tour Really? You haven't heard it yet? I wasn't in Korea for two months Oh Right Can you play the song? Yeah Can you turn up the volume? [Barbecue time during the interval♡] Oh, okay, okay, okay I'm getting a feeling already [The feeling of a hit in that short moment] It's awesome, right? Let's go, No. 1 on the Hot 100! [Billboard HOT 100 No. 1!] Jung Kook, let's go! Get a move on! I can tell just from the first verse that it'll be No. 1 on the HOT 100! Let's go! [Congratulations][Prediction realized] [As he goes from BTS member Jung Kook] [to solo artist Jung Kook] [the song that will begin his journey] [A summer song that will create a splash this summer] Do you have a choreo for this? I do Can I see it? You want me to show you now? Yes, yes, yes, dance [That'd be great] This is how it goes It's perfect for a dance challenge video This is how it goes Nice... Nice...! Wow [Feeling proud] I'm sure it'll go to No. 1 on the HOT 100 You did it! I can relax now It's a great song What are you gonna do for solo promotions? [Q. Any plans for solo promotions?] For my promotions it's not gonna be like a comeback -In that market -It'll be like a debut [Promoting like a new solo artist] it'll be like a debut You have media promotions lined up in the US and the UK? Yes I'll be starting out with Good Morning America How do you want to perform? I just want to do what I do best and be totally awesome at it What will you be performing? "Dynamite" and... "Seven," "Dynamite," "Euphoria" These three Everyone's been dying to see you -Yeah -ARMY I should get myself in shape before I go Go and slay hard [Jung Kook, go and be yourself♡] Everyone will go crazy How did you start this project? [Q. How did you start working on "Seven"?] Didn't you go to the US? Yes, I worked on it in the US [A. Started work in the US] I got the song [First of all] And I loved it -Yeah -The moment I heard it I was like "I have to do this" Totally Without the song "Seven" I might've still been on a break right now I loved being on a break [For real] For real I have a hard time when I'm on a break I was totally enjoying my time off and this song got me started again ["Seven" got him started as a solo artist] If I had heard this song I would've done it myself I'd have been like, "Let me do it I'll sing it in English" [A bold switch to a vocalist] Anyway, so that's how I started You recorded it in the States Yes And while I was there... I am proud to be a K-idol So I worked really hard on the details as I was recording Yeah I had to keep up Korea's BTS's main vocalist Jeon Jung Kook Did you set everyone straight? Uh... I don't know about that -Yeah -But anyway, I did good You recorded it really well [Never sloppy when it comes to music] [Great at his job] [Showed everyone!] -So, you have a digital single coming out -Yes What's next after the single? After the single I have another single Yeah And then, I'll be releasing a small mini album by November [Even planning an album too!] You must be busy then I am Are the songs for the album all ready then? No I have to start working on them now I think this single will be a huge, huge hit I want a song like this for my second single too but I haven't found it I could just write one for you A song by you? Can you do a good job? No [LOL] On my laptop there's every kind of song What about doing Jersey? -Jersey club? -Yeah I did want to try Jersey club I have a track for that! I really do You can do that one! Do what? Just do it Okay? Uh... Just send it to me then Just send it? I've mentioned this a lot on TV shows before but of all the vocalists I've ever met you're the most genius Yes That's what I said about you when I met other songwriters The meeting of two geniuses It's great to see you Yeah, sure And people need to know this Before he joined the agency he had never sung in his life Right And I've seen everything you've gone through ["Genius," a word that always follows Jung Kook around] Honestly, in the past hearing that was a lot of pressure and I didn't like hearing it But I had to work even harder because people were saying that Right You just have to keep going You were born with the talent You're good at singing high notes too I couldn't before What was hard for me when you practiced was that you'd always be singing every moment your eyes were open I'd be like "Can you not sing in the car?" "Can you not sing in the green room?" I got told off a lot But that's how hard you worked Everyone on our team is a super hard worker -We had to be -Yeah And it's been ten years now! Ten years! Wow What's so interesting about our team is that we each have a clear role which is great Yeah Roles that no one else can do I think that really helps us complement each other I love that about us You guys in the rap line were a big influence on us When we were trainees the vocal line would just be fooling around not listening to any songs [The four in the vocal line had a relatively easygoing time] and the rap line guys would get upset -and gather us around -With a list of songs [Gave them work♡] with a long list of songs and told us to make sure to listen to them all You did that for us [Made them listen to various genres of music] So after we debuted... Now I don't listen to them anymore I don't listen to them [Time goes by...] If I'm being honest I didn't listen back then either [The same even as time goes by...] But now you do I just play random songs [Just listens randomly...] But you could do that since you had talent Honestly, you just have talent The agency... made a very great choice But without you... [LOL] what would we have done? I'm just kidding ["I think Jung Kook is our DNA" - RM] No You once said you wanted to be good enough to perform on your own for three to four hours? Yes, during an interview The only concerts I've ever done are our team concerts and I was curious about my own abilities I was curious whether I could put on a concert all on my own You saw me in Seoul My concert [Went to SUGA's concert to cheer him on] I stayed until the very end and I noticed that the stage gradually disappeared Yeah Was that intentional? That was part of the production -Oh! -But people found that really cool Seeing the stage disappear I know! At the end, only a tiny part was left That was a great idea Solo concerts and team concerts are different because for team concerts, there's not much you can do regarding the production [There are limits to stage production for team concerts] Right For example, when we're dancing or performing -the audience has to watch like this -Yeah [The audience's attention is divided evenly among the 7 members] So there aren't a lot of sets or things we can use [More focus on the group performance rather than the stage production] But if you do it alone you can do anything you want I think it'll be fun What should I do for my concerts? Should I come up with ideas already? When the time comes I'll tell you all you need to know I prepared for a really long time for my tour Yeah I did run-throughs starting a month before -Three times a week -Seriously? I did 28 concerts for my tour Wow And I did 20 run-throughs before starting the tour -In Korea? -Yeah I did it exactly like the real thing [Practically did twice as many concerts] You worked really hard Honestly, it was scary doing it alone [Prepared close to perfection feeling the weight of being alone] It must be scary What's good about a team is that you have members supporting you [Dependable members who support you] I caught a really bad cold halfway through [SUGA caught a cold during his tour] It was so bad, I thought I might collapse on stage While during this tour? When I got back to Korea after the tour I did nothing but sleep That must've been so stressful -When I got up in the morning -Yeah you know I never get a hoarse throat -Yeah -But [Couldn't talk due to his poor condition] You couldn't talk? That's how I sounded I was with my parents and they told me to stay in my room [Stayed away from his family just in case] So I got tested but I was okay That's good [Fortunately, he was okay] I didn't have COVID But I still had to go up on stage [Although he was sick] So I did... I just had to do it Even though I was running a fever of 38 to 39 degrees [Fever kept rising] I had to play the guitar and sing but my voice was a mess [ARMY was waiting for me] That's so stressful But I still had to sing live Right The drink you had in your hand was whiskey, wasn't it? Yea, it was a highball At first, it was just whiskey on the rocks but I switched it to a highball after I caught that cold I made it into a "hyperball" -Hyperball? -Yeah Like with an energy... With an energy drink, lemon, and ginger... And things like bellflower root? I just put everything in it [Made a drink to recover his health] I was like, "If I drink this I can perform on stage!" So you were recovering while performing! I could perform on stage [As long as I can perform...!] Anyway, after I had that I got through it even though I was so sick That's the hardest part when performing alone You just have to... You don't have anyone you can lean on Yeah No one's there to take your place You can't run from it [Everything is on you] You just have to go up on stage So if you... do put on a concert I'll give you some tips since I've already done it Do you have tips for when you're sick? I do! I really do! Oh, nice We have to talk about that [While we're on the subject of solo performances] I wondered how you did it Did what? The Qatar World Cup [2022 Qatar] Oh, Qatar I was watching it live Don't you think the entire country was watching it? Prob... ably? While I was watching I said out loud... -I was watching it alone at home -Yeah "He's so cool" For real, for real I was like "Wow" We're on the same team and we perform together but as an ordinary citizen [As Min Yoongi, a Korean citizen] I felt so proud my shoulders went like this [Hehe] That's our team's youngest [That cool kid is our team's youngest] Everyone was talking about you [Jung Kook got a lot of support from the older members] Tell me about how you prepared for it Preparing for it wasn't easy... You know how it is You notice the parts that need work [Tuned up with the members over the years] There were a lot of parts that needed more work It was just different [Different from the stages and setups he was used to] So, I went five to six days before the show in Qatar and I was really glad I got there early Why? I thought I only had to do a rehearsal once I got there but I realized we had to improve some parts [Wanted to do better once he got there!] And I didn't get any choreo either Oh, really? I didn't get anything There were dancers but I didn't have any choreo [Choreo for dancers but not Jung Kook] I thought It would be so weird if I didn't dance while everyone else was so I just asked for the choreo video [Instantly copied the choreo on site] I said I'd just copy it -So you did? -Yeah And during the last chorus the choreo changes -Yeah -It becomes intense like this I asked them to change that part so they did [With Jung Kook's active input] And I redid the formations [The choreo and formations became better] That's how it went Originally, there was nothing But it was so... While I was watching I thought you just looked like a total superstar I was talking with the members and we were like "He has to be a singer until the day he dies" Of course That's what we thought I had a lot of fun [In Qatar] When I walked off stage I felt really bummed though I could've done so much better! That's all I could think about He's the type that really cries if he feels if he didn't do well on stage He gets so upset "SUGA" I can't help but think "Is this really the best I can do?" I look at myself really subjectively -Yeah -instead of objectively Because it's me I always wonder if I did well That's our strength Constantly wanting to do better is our strength but we do need to be a bit objective about our team and ourselves Since we can't always live like that [with regrets] That's what I'm trying to do these days! Thinking that way shows me what I need to work on more -Separately -That's true I have to be able to look at things objectively [Being objective] in order to see the areas I lack in [leads to improvement and positivity] and I'll be able to work on them This is where I think you've grown a lot In the past, when you were stuck on something... I couldn't get past it You'd have such a hard time [Jung Kook blamed himself in the past and had a hard time] No matter how much we told you it was okay [Even though members said it was okay] you couldn't get over it even three to four years ago [Couldn't look at himself objectively] Right -When we were on tour -But as we went on a break [However, through their break] you were able to focus on yourself Through Qatar and your new single [Seven] I can tell that you've grown a lot [Jung Kook was able to shine more] Yeah, life became more enjoyable -Right -I think it's nice We've lived with intensity I just know instinctively When you were younger [The golden maknae] you had a lot of worries [In the past] -I did -Yeah I think I feel reassured now You're doing well on your own I think it's all because I met the really good BTS members The six of us think we're lucky [Our Jung Kook♡] that we met you That's what's great about our team We fought a lot when we were younger That's how we came this far I met Jimin yesterday for drinks You did? You had drinks with Jimin He always talks about that when we meet -About the past -Yeah [Talking about memories] Our memories Right, right, right I think this was all possible because we didn't know anything back then If we had known what to do and when [If we had known from the start] I don't think we could have done this We were all just kind of fools and did what we were told -We were so raw -Yeah And we all wanted to do more And felt things were unfair so we worked that much harder Our video clips start to show up during MAMA season Yeah [Dizzy] But seriously watching them makes me cry a little -Really? -Yeah I was watching the MAMA "Mic Drop" clip [2017 MAMA "Mic Drop" performance] Yeah That one's okay What was that one? For our 10th anniversary they played the video for "No More Dream" and I almost threw the remote control "No More Dream" was pretty good I can't bring myself to watch it Your gesture You only had this one move Just one move! This is all I do "It's a lie" This is all you do [Jung Kook] Why did I do that? Come on, we had just debuted You can't expect us to perform like we do now The Jeon Jung Kook now is not the same person as the Jeon Jung Kook then If we had done well then maybe we wouldn't have worked so hard Because of that rawness back then you ended up performing at the Qatar World Cup It's so embarrassing [Embarrassing] Jimin talks about it too We've been in this industry for a long time -That's what he talks about -We have to keep at it I think we'll still be around when we're 60 It's Chapter 2 now I think we can go up to Chapter 6 Let's say each chapter is ten years When we get older, we can do an a cappella version of "No More Dream" We could do dinner shows Sounds fun How fun would that be? Ha... ARMY will be grannies too by then No, they won't be as old as grannies No I mean, we'd be like grandpas too Shouldn't we be at least 60 years old then? Wouldn't we be that old around Chapter 6? While I was on tour, I felt that our fans are growing older together with us Right And so while we continue to do music as we grow older and talk about past memories we just grow older together talking about it [With ARMY] -I did a video call fansign event -Yeah [Agust D met with ARMY through a video call fansign event] recently We can talk one on one now And you know how we couldn't do promotions during the pandemic?
